Name: Danube Group
Description:
Danube Group is a Dubai-based diversified business conglomerate with interests in building materials, home décor, and real estate development. Established in the year 1993 by Founder and Chairman Rizwan Sajan – a UAE-based entrepreneur – the Danube Group achieved a US$ 2 billion (Dh7 billion) annual turnover in 2022.
 
From a small trading firm, Danube has grown into one of the largest building materials companies in the region, with its diversified branches worldwide including UAE, Oman, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and India, in addition to procurement offices in China and Canada.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Name: Biancogres Grupo
Description:
Design e tecnologia sempre foram nossos pontos fortes. Com mais de meio século de experiência, fomos precursores na produção do Porcelanato Digital Polido e do formato 120x120 no Brasil. Hoje, produzimos mais de 40 milhões de m² ao ano, em parque fabril de 400.000 m² e geramos 1.350 empregos diretos e 10 mil indiretos.

Cada revestimento Biancogres é fruto de uma extensa pesquisa de materiais, estilos e tendências e o nosso propósito é produzir revestimentos primorosos capazes de transformar sonhos em ambientes encantadores.

We now look to fill our customers’ needs on a larger scale while also keeping our prices the lowest around. LifeSupplyUSA products are available for shipping anywhere in the United States and worldwide. Even with our growing success, we remain a close-knit family owned and operated business. We believe this warm atmosphere and culture gives us a competitive edge in our approach to address each customer with the attention and cooperation they deserve.

Name: HEALTHUNBOX PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Healthunbox Pvt Ltd is the fastest-growing online e-commerce company in India. We believe in making your life healthy and happy. Our vision is to create a world where everyone can live a healthier, happier, and no-compromise lifestyle. We are constantly innovating in our field to bring you the healthiest products at the best price possible. We at Healthunbox understand that Organic food is not just important for you, it’s also important for our planet and generations to come. Our team will constantly work towards improving our product catalog & services so that we can provide high-quality organic gardening products at the best possible prices to all our customers throughout India.

Our brand is Organicbazar, Organicbazar.net is an online marketplace for gardening products. We are focusing on gardening products not available in local stores to make your garden. With a wide variety of quality products at great prices, we’re your one-stop shop for all things garden-related! Not only do we carry a wide range of essential gardening supplies, but we also offer helpful advice and tips on our site to help you get the most out of your garden. Whether you’re a beginner or a pro, we’ve got everything you need to make your garden flourish!

Who We Are….
We are the fastest-rising company offering an easy-to-navigate and user-friendly website for providing high-quality genuine gardening products at reasonable prices. We are committed to bringing you the best quality organic products at affordable prices.

Born out of the need to simplify the search for gardening products online, we created a unique ‘website’ that filled the gaps left by others in the market. , we are self-confident to turn out to be the most reliable place to find the latest gardening products online.

Our Vision
Delivering trustworthy experiences that you cherish for a lifetime. Our Customers mean everything to us, and we along with our entire team remain committed to doing whatever it takes to help our client

Nos destacamos por brindar a nuestros clientes productos de la construcción moderna que combinan diseño, durabilidad y accesibilidad.

Nuestra red de 13 agencias en diversas ubicaciones estratégicas nos permite atender de manera eficiente a constructores, arquitectos, decoradores y consumidores finales, proporcionándoles la confianza y el respaldo de una empresa comprometida con la excelencia. Además, nuestros canales de venta en línea facilitan el acceso a un catálogo amplio y en constante actualización.

Description:
Somos una empresa ubicada en la ciudad de Guayaquil que cuenta con 2 líneas de negocios, Kitton eléctrico y Kitton Home Center. 
Kitton eléctrico con más de 20 años en el mercado especializado en la venta al por mayor y menor de una amplia gama de materiales eléctricos y ferreteros, cables e iluminación, entre otras líneas.
Kitton Home Center con 5 años en el mercado dedicado a la venta al por menor de artículos para el hogar, con más de 18 categorías entre ellas decoración, cocina, iluminación, grifería, jardinería, electrodomésticos, mascotas, escolar, tecnología y más.
Somos importadores y distribuidores de reconocidas marcas nacionales e internacionales. Comercializamos dentro y fuera de la ciudad de Guayaquil. Nos caracterizamos por ofrecer productos de muy buena calidad a los mejores precios del mercado.

Name: United Hardware
Description:
Our combined turnover is in excess of €400 million and we operate in all 26 counties in the Republic of Ireland. This makes United Hardware Ltd the largest representative group in the whole of Ireland and a market leader in sourcing and purchasing products.

Formed as a joint venture between National Hardware Ltd (NHL) and Associated Hardware Ltd (AHL), United Hardware Ltd operates from an 14,000ft2 purpose built warehouse on the outskirts of Dublin serviced by the M50 and M7 Motorways. The objective of this joint venture buying group was to offer its members greater purchasing power, more substantial discounts and a more streamlined purchasing process. These benefits are now being enjoyed by its members across Ireland.

The Commercial Team within United Hardware purchase a variety of hardware categories including timber, heating and plumbing, sheeting materials, building supplies, paint and decor, joinery, tools, giftware, houseware and garden items. We have developed a number of own brand ranges including the Home Collection and Garden Collection brands. We operate a delivered home nationwide service from our Dublin warehouse on an ex-stock basis. Members of United Hardware can purchase product from our warehouse portal which gives live information on pricing and stock availability.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Name: Bezpoke
Description:
Since its inception, Bezpoke has grown into a specialized premium building materials and integrated solutions company, serving residential, hospitality, commercial, and large-scale development projects.

Our core strength lies in sourcing and supplying high-quality imported surfaces, tiles, marble, engineered stone, kitchens, wardrobes, bathroom fittings, lighting systems, doors, and architectural interior products—selected for performance, durability, and design integrity rather than trends alone.

Beyond supply, Bezpoke provides design coordination, technical detailing, and project support, ensuring that materials are specified, executed, and delivered to meet real-world construction and operational requirements. We work closely with developers, architects, consultants, contractors, and direct clients to bridge the gap between material selection and successful project delivery.

Driven by global sourcing, technical expertise, and long-term value creation, Bezpoke focuses on building materials that elevate spaces through quality, precision, and reliability.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Name: Grupo IGL | Viveza & BEL LAR
Description:
Com o propósito de nos dedicar ao bem-estar de cada pessoa com sua casa, o Grupo IGL nasceu do espírito empreendedor do Sr. Inimá Garcia (in memoriam), que em 1966 abriu sua primeira loja em Divinópolis. O negócio, que começou de forma simples, vendendo principalmente cimento e cal – produtos que inspiraram o nome da empresa –, se transformou em um grupo sólido e respeitado no setor de materiais de construção.

Atualmente, o Grupo IGL está presente em diversas cidades de Minas Gerais: Divinópolis, com 4 lojas, além de Arcos, Belo Horizonte, Pará de Minas, Oliveira, Nova Serrana, Itaúna e Lagoa da Prata. Cada uma de nossas unidades segue o princípio de entregar soluções de qualidade e oferecer uma experiência única aos nossos clientes, seja em pequenos reparos ou grandes projetos.

Nosso diferencial está em nossa equipe de especialistas, especialmente o time de vendas, que vai além do atendimento comum, atuando como verdadeiros consultores, prontos para entender as necessidades e realizar os sonhos de nossos clientes. Com uma abordagem colaborativa, nosso time é movido pela paixão por servir e pelo desejo constante de inovar.

“A nossa obrigação é plantar. Plantar, capinar, irrigar e cuidar. A colheita vem.” Inimá Garcia Leão
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Our team of creative professionals will guide your customer journey towards the more researched combination of tiles for your kitchen, living room, bedroom, powder room or outdoor patio. We are supplying you with high-quality tiles, or slabs, according to your pursuit of taste. 

Our slogan is affordable Luxury: our mission indeed is to provide the finest 
trim (from marble, stone, to wooden effect) at a competitive cost for your happy pockets. 

Therefore, for those looking to be classy but with a touch of simplicity inside their workplace or the cosy sphere of your home, Ivy Tile is now in Dubai for you!

Last but not least, you may be glad to know our Ivy Tile showroom ships all over the UAE. 

Needless to say:
We are looking forward to seeing you!

Description:
Desde 1993 a Veneza sonha junto com os pernambucanos e contribui para que seus desejos se tornem realidade. Com o DNA genuinamente vitoriense, somos mais de 400 pessoas trabalhando nas 11 filiais, centro de distribuição e administrativo. 

Da capital ao interior, estamos nas cidades de Vitória de Santo Antão, Recife, Gravatá, Jaboatão dos Guararapes, Escada, Limoeiro, Bezerros e Caruaru, com comprometimento e respeito aos consumidores e fornecedores. 

Oferecemos soluções para obras e reformas, com as melhores marcas do mercado em material de construção, pisos e revestimentos, tintas e acessórios, louças e metais, iluminação e elétrica, utilidades domésticas para o lar.

Nosso objetivo é crescer 100% no mercado pernambucano até 2023 e estar cada vez mais presente nos lares e na vida dos nossos clientes. Porque somos especialistas em realizar sonhos.

Name: Nupami BD Ltd - Porcelanosa Associate of Bangladesh
Description:
Founded in 2013, Nupami has been dedicated to bringing premium, Spanish-made products to the Asian market. As the exclusive distributor of Porcelanosa Grupo in Bangladesh, we have quickly become a leader in high-end building materials. For more than a decade, we have provided unmatched quality and luxury, playing a key role in Porcelanosa’s continued success and growth in the region.

As an authorized Porcelanosa associate, Nupami offers a comprehensive portfolio of building solutions: tiles, large-format surfaces, natural stones, mosaics, façades, Krion solid surfaces, sanitaryware, bathroom cabinetry, wardrobes, walk-in closets, kitchen cabinetry, and advanced technical systems. Esteemed architects and developers trust us for our innovative materials, forward-thinking designs, and commitment to contemporary architectural trends.

In 2016, we expanded operations to Myanmar, responding to the growing demand for world-class building solutions. Over time, our product range has evolved to include luxury furniture—such as beds and sofas—crafted in Spain, ensuring a complete luxury lifestyle offering.

At Nupami, our passion lies in delivering unparalleled living and design experiences. Every project we undertake reflects innovation, quality, and timeless style—cementing our position as a premier brand in modern luxury living.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Name: ReUrban

En nuestra fábrica, la experiencia y la competencia técnica de nuestros empleados, impulsadas por el uso del equipo más moderno, garantizan la calidad del producto final.
Creemos que la calidad se basa en la eficiencia y la funcionalidad, independientemente del tamaño de la pieza. La creatividad, funcionalidad y calidad de nuestras respuestas en mobiliario urbano, parques infantiles, equipamiento deportivo, alumbrado público y señalización hacen de BriCANTEL una referencia en el sector.

Name: Himmel's Architectural Door & Hardware, LLC
Description:
Himmel’s Architectural Door & Hardware, LLC is a full-service Division 8 and 10 distributor founded in 1983. Our purpose is simple: We provide opening solutions that secure peace of mind.

With locations in Dallas, TX; Houston, TX; Nashville, TN; New Orleans, LA; and Prairieville, LA, each ranging from 30,000 to 40,000 square feet, we are fully equipped with fabrication shops, warehouse inventory, and trained field crews.

We carry one of the largest in-stock selections of commercial door hardware, wood doors, hollow metal doors and frames, as well as Division 10 accessories. Our certified installers and technicians are qualified to handle jobs of all sizes, from single openings to multi-million-dollar installations, and are fully trained to work in sensitive environments, such as hospitals and chemical plants.

From licensed locksmiths to AAADM-certified automatic door techs, our expert team delivers quality service and support across every project.

Firmamız 1978 yılında torna tesviye atölyesi ve su motoru tamiri ile ticarete başlamıştır.

Firmamız toplamda 7500 m² kapalı 11.000 m² açık alanda hizmet vermektedir.

Firmamız 2019 yılında tarımdan sanayiye, otomotivden endüstriye, yapı ürünlerinden ambalaja 55.000 ürün çeşidi ile Pamukova, Geyve, Taraklı, Göynük, İznik, Osmaneli, Gölpazarı, Bilecik ve Doğu Marmara bölgesinde müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Ourimadeiras Casa e Construção
Description:
Temos uma trajetória de 21 anos, reconhecida por mais de 100 colaboradores que têm como missão principal ajudar os clientes a concretizar seus sonhos de construir ou reformar, oferecendo beleza e qualidade à obra, com um atendimento especializado e dedicado da nossa equipe.
Hoje, contamos com três lojas, além do nosso Outlet, com a matriz em Ourinhos desde 2002 e filiais em Santa Cruz do Rio Pardo, inaugurada em 2015, e Piraju, aberta em 2022. Dispomos de uma infraestrutura completa no nosso Centro de Distribuição para atender toda a região e oferecer o melhor aos nossos clientes.
Em 2020, iniciamos as vendas online com a inauguração do nosso e-commerce, permitindo aos nossos clientes a praticidade e comodidade de adquirir nossos produtos de qualquer lugar.
Trabalhamos com uma vasta gama de produtos que vão desde o início o final da obra, incluindo novidades até, lançamentos e produtos com a qualidade que nossos clientes desejam. Estamos em constante evolução para trazer o que há de melhor no mercado.
Nosso compromisso é sempre oferecer o melhor atendimento e produtos de qualidade, e estamos de portas abertas para receber todos que desejam fazer parte da nossa história. Venha fazer parte da família Ourimadeiras e conte conosco para realizar os seus projetos de construção e reforma!

Name: NATURE ET DEVELOPPEMENT
Description:
Situés dans toute la France, les magasins de matériaux écologiques N&D ont travaillé ensemble à l’élaboration d’un réseau local d’artisans ainsi que d’un catalogue de matériaux naturels, allant de la construction à la peinture écologique, du gros œuvre à la finition.

Que ce soit pour une construction ou une rénovation, les solutions pour réduire sa consommation énergétique s’appliquent dans tous les domaines de l’eco-habitat.

Les seuls concepts qui vaillent à la définition d’une bonne maison écologique, d’une maison passive sont plutôt des notions de performance d’isolation thermique, de qualité d’air (ventilation), de solution acoustique, d’étanchéité, de gestion de l’eau et d’humidité.

Description:
Fundada em 1973 a Rampa é uma empresa de intermediação de negócios com foco em suprimentos para construção civil. Através da sua atuação, busca conectar os clientes com os melhores fornecedores de produtos e serviços do segmento, visando agregar valor na cadeia.

O Grupo Rampa tem como bases sólidas o foco no cliente e o cuidado com as pessoas. E atuando dessa forma acreditamos que podemos agregar cada vez mais valor nos mercados que atendemos, além de gerar transformações positivas na nossa sociedade.

Name: BRICO OK ITALIA
Description:
Brico OK è il Gruppo di riferimento italiano nel comparto bricolage e fai da te di prossimità.

Il brand è nato nel 1995 dall’unione di alcuni imprenditori indipendenti con l’obiettivo di creare un network che riuscisse a ottenere migliori condizioni nell’approvvigionamento delle forniture e quindi anche nel prezzo al cliente, mantenendo il valore della qualità. In breve tempo il sistema Brico OK ebbe una crescita esponenziale e dai 9 negozi degli albori si è arrivati nel 2021 a superare i 110 punti vendita sul territorio nazionale, tutt’oggi in aumento.

Uno sviluppo ottenuto grazie a una particolare attenzione alle politiche promozionali e di comunicazione, oltre che alla creazione di un modello di business che incentiva la partnership e l’apertura di franchising.

Oggi il marchio Brico Ok è presente in tantissime città e paesi italiani con l’obiettivo di rispondere in maniera ottimale e capillare sia al professionista che cerca materiali tecnici, sia al bricolista o al semplice cittadino che cercano un negozio vicino casa, fornito e al passo coi tempi.

La formula di partnership collaudata da Brico Ok permette a tutti i punti vendita della rete di acquistare alle stesse condizioni economiche e di servizio e di usufruire del potere di comunicazione del Gruppo.
Il singolo punto vendita ha la forza di tutta la rete.

Description:
MyTyles is an Online Retailer in the tiling industry based out of Bangalore, India. The first Indian tile company to offer tiles in both online and offline stores, transparency, variety, and perseverance form the backbone of our organisation. Bringing together a wide range of imported and homegrown tiles from the finest manufacturers across the globe has allowed us to cater to the needs of a modern homeowner.

Since 2016, we have been committed to a vision of a world where Indian consumers can shop for tiles from the comfort of wherever they are over taps and clicks. Showcasing little known, historical, ethnic and trending items together under one brand name is only the first step in that direction.

Name: Rise
Description: Rise strives to make sustainable home improvement easy and accessible for everyone. As a one-stop online store, we offer a curated selection of building products that are backed by educational content and research. Our direct-to-consumer/contractor approach is designed to provide products that meet the highest standards for energy efficiency, durability, and environmental responsibility. Whether you're building or renovating, our vetted building products will help you reduce your carbon footprint, lower energy costs, and create a more sustainable living or working environment. Trust that your projects will not only perform at the highest level, but also contribute to a better future for our planet.

Name: Stenbolaget AB
Description:
Stenbolaget is Sweden's leading company in stone sales D2C and B2B. We started in 2005 and have rapidly grown into Sweden's largest supplier of granite, slate, paving stones and masonry.

We continue to grow and had a turnover of SEK 225 million in 2022 with good profitability. We are undergoing strong growth and expect to grow by +30% annually in the future. Name: Brick Tile Shop Pty Ltd
Description:
Brick Tile Shop timeless clay cladding brick tiles are perfect for any interior or exterior application in both residential and commercial design
Brick Tile Shop clay brick tiles provide a unique, natural, and organic look. The color variety of our products originates from a traditional brick firing method we employ. Brick Tile Shop tiles provide a stylish alternative to artificial tiles and can be used to both transform the appearance and enhance the value of any room or wall.

Our range of face brick tiles are used to transform ordinary walls into aesthetically appealing walls. Brick Tile Shop environmentally friendly products offer value for money and a sound, long-term investment.

Modern, automated clay brick firing methods, cannot render face bricks with a wide spectrum of colors. The firing method we use gives clay brick tiles that are unique in texture and appearance.

Brick Tile Shop brick tiles are lightweight, chemically inert, acoustically sound, and strong.

Fired clay face brick tiles contain zero toxins or harmful leachates and are eco-friendly to use inside a home or office.

Most clay bricks in South Africa, are clamp kiln fired. This method is unique to Africa.

During the unpacking of a clamp kiln, bricks are classified in a variety of predetermined colors. The color range can vary range from purple, dark red, yellow, brown, and even red borders with black streaks inside.

Face bricks similar in the color range are placed into a tile cutting machine where several diamond blades will cut the bricks into 9mm thick brick cladding tiles. The cutting process exposes the earthy beautiful colors hidden inside the face bricks.

Not one brick tile is identical to the other, however, a certain colour range of bricks will render a range of similar colors, resulting in a one-of-a-kind tiled wall with an aesthetic and unique, earthy appearance.

Once the first color is selected, color harmony can be created.

Name: Sergio Bassan S.r.l.
Description:
Con 8 sedi in Veneto, 1 in Friuli Venezia Giulia ed 1 in Sardegna, Sergio Bassan Srl, commercializza dal 1957 prodotti all'avanguardia, tra cui i principali John Deere e Kobelco. Negli anni l’azienda diventa un punto di riferimento per gli agricoltori del Nord-Est Italiano, grazie alla qualità del servizio, alla professionalità del personale ed alla rete capillare che copre tutto il territorio in concessione, affermandosi in Italia tra i primi 3 concessionari di macchine agricole e movimento terra.
La società nasce a Dueville (VI) nel 1957 da un’idea di Piero Bassan, giovane allevatore, che intuisce l’importanza e lo sviluppo della meccanizzazione in agricoltura. Nel 1993, il figlio Sergio, che fin da piccolo ha vissuto con grande curiosità il mondo dell’agricoltura, intraprende la sua strada spostando la Sede principale a Costabissara (VI): in questo stesso anno, Sergio Bassan, diventa concessionario ufficiale John Deere per le province di Vicenza e Padova. Nel corso degli anni (2005-2013), il rapporto con l’azienda americana cresce e si consolida con reciproca stima e fiducia: vengono così affidate in concessione alla Sergio Bassan S.r.l. le province di Rovigo, Treviso, Padova e Venezia. Il 2016 rappresenta un anno di svolta epocale: in primis, a fronte della crescita in sinergia secondo le linee guida della casa madre John Deere, viene affidata in concessione anche la provincia di Verona. Sempre nel 2016, la Sergio Bassan S.r.l. entra nel business del movimento terra diventando importatore per il Triveneto del prestigioso marchio giapponese Kobelco.
Oltre alle partnership con John Deere e Kobelco, nel 2018 la Sergio Bassan S.r.l. diventa concessionario Kramer, nel 2020 importatore di attrezzature Vaderstad e nel 2022 importatore unico per l’Italia per il marchio Ploeger. Da diversi anni inoltre collabora con i principali marchi di riferimento a livello mondiale. 
A Febbraio 2022 la Sergio Bassan S.r.l è stata ufficialmente ammessa al Network e sevizi ELITE S.p.A.

Name: Pent Haus
Description:
Over 15 years ago, our journey began, driven by our love for the outdoors and a vision for a smart, eco-friendly construction that maximises available space. This journey led us to a ground-breaking approach in garden room construction, empowering both DIY enthusiasts and professionals to effortlessly create premium, long-lasting garden rooms.

At the heart of our mission is the creation of tailor-made, self-build garden buildings, meticulously engineered with cutting-edge materials and craftsmanship. Every component is precision-cut by our skilled craftsmen in our Mid Wales factory, ensuring a perfect fit for your project, and we deliver everything you need in one comprehensive package.

Inside our garden rooms, we've integrated wiring channels for high-speed electrics, while our internal packages feature CNC-cut plasterboard or wall panelling, eliminating the need for installers to wrestle with awkward panel angles. Our uniquely designed garden room packages are not just easy to build; they're the simplest and most straightforward available, enabling you to construct your dream space in just one day, guided by our user-friendly build manual.

Each Pent Haus we create is as unique as its owner, with bespoke finishing touches and personalised service from start to finish. We've prioritised design, materials, and construction to offer an affordable luxury garden room that doesn't compromise on quality. Our approach makes it possible for homeowners and DIY enthusiasts to fashion a versatile space that enhances their lifestyle without breaking the bank.

Every Pent Haus boasts consistent insulation throughout the walls, floor, and ceiling, carefully designed to minimise thermal bridges. This sealed envelope of insulation ensures exceptional thermal efficiency, resulting in lower running costs and comfortable temperatures year-round, even in the ever-changing British climate.

Choose Pent Haus and embrace a world of possibilities for your outdoor space.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

1. Steel Doors Division
ToughGuard offers a wide range of Premium, Semi-Luxury, and Luxury steel doors designed for modern Indian homes. These doors combine the strength of steel with the look and feel of wood, offering unmatched durability, safety, and style. Our focus on hassle-free installation, customer-first service, and honest pricing has helped us become one of Coimbatore’s fastest-growing steel door brands, with 350+ satisfied customers and counting.

2. Motors and Pumps Division
Carrying forward the legacy of JJ Borewells, we continue to specialize in domestic motor and pump solutions including:
	•	Submersible motors and pumps
	•	Openwell and self-priming pumps
	•	Submersible flat cables
	•	Panel boards and starters
	•	Borewell column pipes

With an experienced team and deep technical expertise, we provide dependable solutions for residential borewell and water system needs.

At ToughGuard Distributors, we’re proud to offer everything under one name, blending tradition with innovation. Whether it’s securing your home or ensuring your water flow never stops, we’re committed to delivering quality, trust, and peace of mind — one home at a time.

Name: Speedibin Composter
Description:
We are all about backyard composting! We design, manufacture and distribute the Speedibin composter. An all metal, vermin resistant composter, it is ideal for backyard composting, as well as community gardens, school gardens and businesses that generate organic waste. Speedibins keep out rats, mice and other vermin and they're easy to use. Our goal is to remove hurdles to backyard composting. 

The large volume, 405 litres (107 US gallons), can compost all the organic waste of a typical household and can hold enough biomass for hot composting if desired. The latching handle keeps out raccoons and dogs. A metal screen on the bottom allows worms and microbes and water to transfer while precluding vermin. The large lid allows easy access for dumping and mixing. Also the front panel slides right out for easy removal of finished compost. The galvanized powder-coated metal lasts about 30 years. 

A family business, Fresh Earth Products, which designs and markets Speedibins, is owned by Joyce and Paul McMenamon. Speedibins were originally designed by Joyce's Dad, Fred Francis, in 1989. At that time, they didn't compete well with the cheap plastic bins flooding the market so Fred stopped the business. Then City Farmer in Vancouver asked if we would build them again because of the rat problem in Vancouver. Joyce found her Dad's old drawings and started tweaking the design. Now 30 years after Fred's idea, people are loving Speedibins because rats can't get into their compost. 

Fabricated in Port Coquitlam, BC, Canada, Speedibins are available through our online store and locally at our farm in Merville BC. They are loved by gardeners everywhere including households, schools, co-housing and municipalities. Feed the soil that feeds the plants that feed us!

Name: DeckWright Anti-Slip Decking
Description:
DeckWright anti-slip boards provide a reassuring grip to reduce the risk of injury in wet or slippery conditions. Ideal for small or large scale commercial projects with high footfall, we're capable of manufacturing and supplying large quantities. 

DeckWright anti-slip services are often used in full timber decking areas or in places of higher risk, such as steps or walkways. Even when they’re applied to heavy-traffic areas on commercial sites, the strips don’t deteriorate over time. They provide a longer life and better performance than other anti-slip products such as abrasive paints.

There is a misconception that plastic decking provides the best anti-slip solution. This just isn’t true as plastic decks anti-slip performance when wet is significantly lower than a wooded deck with DeckWright anti-slip (and at a much lower price).

Name: The Sterling Lumber & Investment Co
Description:
Sterling Lumber has been building Colorado since 1909, earning the trust of contractors, builders, and homeowners with unmatched service and deep industry experience. With 10 full-service lumber distribution yards and a dedicated truss manufacturing facility, we’re positioned to support projects of every size across the state.

Our teams provide expert support from blueprint to build—offering accurate takeoffs, project estimating, truss and floor system design, and custom cabinetry solutions. Whether you’re framing a custom home, managing a commercial build, or tackling a home improvement project, we deliver the products and expertise you need to get the job done right.

We carry a comprehensive lineup of building materials including framing lumber, engineered wood, roofing, siding, millwork, decking, doors, windows, insulation, fasteners, and tools—all backed by dependable inventory and professional support.

With locations in Sterling, South Fork, Walsenburg, Estes Park, Pagosa Springs, Monte Vista, Boulder, Lafayette, Steamboat Springs, and Buena Vista, we’re proud to be Colorado-owned, Colorado-focused, and trusted by professionals and homeowners alike for over a century.

Name: WRI Sp. z o. o.
Description:
Jesteśmy prężnie rozwijającą się polską firmą z wieloletnim doświadczeniem w handlu. To pozwoliło nam w 2021 roku wykonać odważny krok i stworzyć własną markę HIPPER.pl. Pod szyldem z przyjaznym hipopotamem prowadzimy sklep internetowy i sieć marketów Dom & Ogród – w tej chwili to już 11 sklepów stacjonarnych na terenie całej Polski. Naszym klientom oferujemy asortyment m.in. z zakresu budowy i remontu oraz wyposażenia domu i ogrodu.

Rozwój jest tym, co umieszczamy najwyżej na liście naszych priorytetów. To w połączeniu z pracą z zaufanymi ludźmi pozwala nam nieustannie poszerzać ofertę marki i otwierać kolejne sklepy stacjonarne na terenie całej Polski.

Naszą misją jest stworzenie dla mieszkańców mniejszych miejscowości (do 25 tys. mieszkańców) nowoczesnych i wygodnych sklepów, w których zaopatrzą się w niezbędne akcesoria do budowy, remontu, renowacji i aranżacji wnętrz domów, mieszkań i ogrodów. Zależy nam, aby nasza oferta trafiała do ludzi, którzy na co dzień w swojej najbliższej okolicy nie mają możliwości zaopatrzenia się w podobny asortyment. Pomaga nam w tym własny sklep internetowy, dzięki któremu docieramy do każdego zakątka Polski.

Sieć HIPPER.pl odpowiada na potrzeby zmieniającego się rynku, w tym sektora e-commerce. Proponujemy szybkie i łatwe zakupy, dostępność dla mieszkańców mniejszych miast i miasteczek oraz nowoczesne formy zakupowe. Oferujemy szereg korzyści, wygodę zakupów i nowoczesne rozwiązania, które doceniane są zarówno lokalnie, jak i globalnie.

W latach 2023-2024 mamy już zaplanowane otwarcia 5 kolejnych sklepów. Nie zwalniamy jednak tempa i wciąż poszukujemy lokalizacji pod nowe sklepy. W tej chwili markety HIPPER.pl znajdą się w Zelowie, Koziegłowach pod Poznaniem, Środzie Wielkopolskiej, Świnoujściu, Nakle nad Notecią, Szubinie, Witkowie, Osiu, Tucholi, Nowogardzie i Przasnyszu.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Name: Casa Fuegia
Description:
CASA FUEGIA, es una empresa familiar fundada en 1964 en la Ciudad de Rio Grande. Llamada así en honor a la pequeña aborigen Fueguina secuestrada por Fitz Roy en 1830, quien fue llevada a Inglaterra para «civilizar». La niña asombró por su facilidad para aprender y diez meses más tarde la devolvieron a la isla, utilizándola como intérprete entre los nativos y los exploradores. Los ingleses la llamaron Fuegia Basket.
En 1967 inauguramos una sucursal en la ciudad de Ushuaia, siguiendo ésta en crecimiento continuo.
Hoy la firma es liderada por la tercera generación de mujeres de la familia. Acompañamos el crecimiento de la población y su demanda, lo cual nos fue llevando a especializarnos cada vez más en revestimientos interiores y materiales de terminación para las viviendas. Actualmente, nos mantenemos a la vanguardia del mercado destacándonos en la calidad de atención y servicio.

 Drip irrigation pipes: turbulent (NPC) , self-compensating (PC), anti-drainage (PCND) and subsurface (SDI).

Name: BHB - Handelsverband Heimwerken, Bauen und Garten e.V.
Description:
BOTSCHAFTER DER DIY-BRANCHE
Seit fast 50 Jahren vertritt der BHB als Wirtschaftsverband die Interessen von Baumarkt- und Gartenhandelsbetrieben sowie Hersteller- und Dienstleistungsunternehmen der DIY-Branche  in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz (D-A-CH-Region).  Als international ausgerichteter Verband ist der BHB als Gründungsmitglied der European DIY Retail Association (EDRA) in ganz Europa und weltweit aktiv.
Der BHB ist erster Ansprechpartner für Politik, Industriepartner, Medien und Wirtschaft. Zum heutigen Zeitpunkt (Juli 2023) profitieren über 20 große Retailer sowie über 230 Fördermitglieder von der aktiven praxis- und serviceorientierten Arbeit des Verbandes. 

DER BHB BRINGT UNTERNEHMEN ZUSAMMEN
Seit 1974 besteht das Ziel des Handelsverbandes Heimwerken, Bauen und Garten e.V. (BHB) darin, den offenen Dialog der beteiligten Unternehmen der DIY-Branche zu fördern und diese in der Öffentlichkeit als eigenständige Branche zu präsentieren. 1991 neu strukturiert, repräsentiert der BHB große Filialisten genauso wie Kooperationen, mittelstandsorientierte Filialisten mit Fachmarkt-Charakter, Franchise-Systeme sowie als fördernde Mitglieder Industrie- und Dienstleistungsunternehmen, Messegesellschaften und unabhängige Organisationen. Diese besondere Struktur ist Markenzeichen des BHB, der als Branchenverband alle Unternehmen des Marktes unter einem Dach vereint.

EIN BEDEUTENDER WIRTSCHAFTSZWEIG
Dabei agiert der BHB für eine enorme Wirtschaftskraft: 2022 erzielte der deutsche DIY-Kernmarkt - bestehend aus Baumärkten, Fachmärkten und Kleinbetriebsformen des Fachhandels - einen Branchenumsatz von 52,7 Milliarden Euro.  Der Gesamtbruttoumsatz der deutschen Bau- und Heimwerkermärkte erreichte 2022 einen Wert von rund 21,92 Milliarden Euro. Die Branche zählt in Deutschland rund 490.000 Beschäftigte.

Welcome to Ridan

Food waste is an environmental problem.
We are tackling that problem by designing and manufacturing a range of eco-friendly composting machines suitable for food waste recycling at home and commercial catering.

Why is food waste harmful?

It is estimated that 11.8 Million tonnes of food waste end up in landfill in the UK alone. Thrown into landfill, the food simply rots away.

This process releases harmful Co2 gases (20% of the UK’s greenhouse emissions) into the atmosphere as well as emitting toxic liquid effluent which can leach into the soil and waterways

Die DVS Beregnung ist Ihr Expertenteam für alle Bewässerungsfragen

Als herstellerunabhängiger Lieferant mit breit gefächertem Sortiment bieten wir Gärtnern sowie Profis aus dem Garten- und Landschaftsbau seit über 10 Jahren alles rund um das Thema Bewässerungssysteme. Wir begleiten Sie von der projektbezogenen Beratung über die Planung bis hin zur Installation von Bewässerungsanlagen.

Kleines Team - große Wirkung
Die DVS Beregnung betreibt keinen automatisierten Massenhandel, bei uns stehen echte Menschen dahinter. Ihre Bewässerungsanlage wird in unserem Tübinger Lager handverlesen und mit Köpfchen zusammengestellt, die Plug&Rain-Baugruppen werden hier vor Ort montiert. Dazu steht unser Team für ein außerordentliches Innovationspotenzial. Unser Anspruch ist, das komplexe Thema der Bewässerungstechnik so einfach, so schlau und so anwenderfreundlich wie möglich zu machen. - kurz: Wir tüfteln gerne und setzen alles daran, für Ihren Garten die perfekte Bewässerungslösung zu verwirklichen.

Bewässern wie die Profis
Im Online-Shop von DVS Beregnung finden Sie ein unmfangreiches Sortiment führender Hersteller wie Hunter, Rain Bird und Irritec. In unserem Tübinger Lager halten wir auf 1.000 m² jederzeit über 2.000 verschiedene Bewässerungsartikel für sämtliche Systeme und Preisklassen vorrätig. 

Einfach, professionell und stressfrei - legen wir gemeinsam los und planen das perfekte Bewässerungssystem für Ihren Garten.

Name: KEAD Albania
Description:
KEAD është një kompani e specializuar në tregtimin me shumicë dhe pakicë të veglave të punës si dhe aksesorëve që lidhen me to që prej vitit 1997. Ne ofrojmë një gamë të gjerë produktesh dhe jemi ndër të parët që kemi sjellë cilësinë Evropiane në tregun Shqiptar.

Zhvillimi i vazhdueshëm i kompanisë dhe objektivat janë bazuar në:
» Kërkimin e vazhdueshëm të produkteve dhe teknologjive më të reja
» Zgjerimin e vazhdueshëm të gamës së produkteve për t’i ofruar klientëve cilësinë maksimale
» Transport të shpejtë për t’ju gjendur pranë klientëve kudo në Shqipëri
» Ruajtjen e raportit më të mirë midis cilësisë dhe çmimit

Qëllimi ynë është të ndihmojmë të bëhet i suksesshëm këdo në fushën e veglave duke vënë në dispozicion të klientit eksperiencën tonë ndër vite.

Tregu dhe kërkesat e klientëve jane në ndryshim të vazhdueshëm. Për të vazhduar drejt rrugës tonë të suksesshme duhet të shohim larg për të kuptuar hapin e radhës në mënyren më të mirë të mundshme:
1. Inovacion: të jemi inovativ duke menduar përtej të sotmes
2. Bashkëpunim: për të arritur më të mirën
3. Partneritet: ndërtimi i një marrëdhënie të fortë dhe afatgjatë me klientët dhe furnitorët
4. Cilësi: të bëjmë gjithmonë në mënyren më të mirë të mundshme çdo gjë që bëjmë
5. Shërbim: të përkushtuar në cdo hap
6. Pasion: impenjohemi jo vetëm me mendje por dhe me zemër

KEAD është sot një pikë referimi për sa i përket shërbimit profesional i ofruar nga një staf i kualifikuar dhe gjithmonë i përkushtuar ndaj klientit, individ apo biznes, cilësisë dhe asistencës teknike. Përkushtimi ynë maksimal është i drejtuar në zhvillimin e vazhdueshëm të produkteve për t’ju përgjigjur nevojave të klientëve, të cilët tashmë janë të shtrirë në të gjithë Shqipërinë dhe Kosovë. 

“GJITHMONË PRANË KLIENTËVE TANË ME CILËSI, SHËRBIM DHE GAMË TË GJERË PRODUKTESH”

•25 VITE EKSPERIENCË
•500+ PARTNERË
•1500+ KLIENTË
•12000+ PRODUKTE

Name: a river in the garden
Description:
Et si votre jardin accueillait un concentré de biodiversité au service de votre santé, tout en préservant les ressources naturelles ? 

Cultivez sans arroser, bientôt disponible.

La cause qui nous anime: 
Démontrer que l'on peut prendre à la fois soin des Hommes et de la planète. Permettre aux familles d'accéder à une alimentation saine, tout en protégeant l'environnement.

Notre mission:
Réinventer les jardins potagers en nous appuyant sur l’aquaponie, une technique de culture aux qualités remarquables. Elle permet de cultiver fruits, légumes et protéines (en élevant des poissons) en réduisant de 90 %, la consommation d’eau par rapport au jardinage traditionnel.

Notre projet:
Inventer des systèmes aquaponiques évolutifs connectés pour créer un mouvement réunissant des milliers de jardiniers aquaponistes qui pourront apprendre ensemble, échanger leurs bonnes pratiques et transmettre à leurs enfants leur sensibilité au Vivant.

Name: WoodBlocX GmbH
Description:
WoodBlocX Landscaping verändert die Zukunft des Marktes für weiche Landschaftsgestaltung. Unser maßgeschneidertes modulares System bietet eine nachhaltige Lösung für Stadtmöbel, erhöhte Pflanzgefäße und Stützmauern. Schnell und einfach vor Ort zu bauen und nachhaltig.

Unsere schnell und einfach zu bauenden Strukturen werden für Dachgärten, Stadterneuerung, Parks und Erholungsgebiete, kommerzielle Entwicklungen, Wohnanlagen, Bildung, Gesundheitswesen, Gastgewerbe und vieles mehr eingesetzt.

Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte, einzigartige Designs für Projekte jeder Größe in ganz Großbritannien, Europa und darüber hinaus. Wir arbeiten Hand in Hand mit Landschaftsarchitekten, Designern, Landschaftsgärtnern, Bauunternehmern und Projektmanagern, um für jedes Projekt die hochwertigste Naturholzlösung zu liefern.

Neben der natürlichen Kieferoberfläche können wir auch jede von uns gefertigte Struktur leicht vorfertigen und verkleiden, so dass Designer jede beliebige Holzoberfläche wählen können, die sie für ihre Projekte benötigen, aber auch die gleiche Baugeschwindigkeit, Garantie und Sicherheit haben, die eine WoodBlocX-Struktur bietet.

Die klobigen hölzernen BlocX werden mit großen Kunststoffdübeln zusammengefügt, um starke Hochbeete, Pflanzgefäße, Stützmauern, Teiche, Bordsteine oder Sitzbereiche zu schaffen - fast jede Struktur, die Sie bauen möchten.

Name: Krepischi Lar e Construção
Description:
A jornada da KREPISCHI, sinônimo de inovação e excelência, teve início em 1956 com a fundação de uma olaria, estabelecendo a base do que viria a ser a semente da nossa empresa, pelas mãos do progenitor dos atuais proprietários.

Em 1962, consolidamos ainda mais nosso legado com a abertura de nossa primeira loja de materiais para construção, situada próxima ao Hospital São Luiz. Esta inauguração marcou um momento revolucionário na forma de comercializar materiais de construção e acabamento na região de Araras, introduzindo um padrão superior de atendimento personalizado no setor.

A expansão da Krepischi se consolidou ainda mais com a construção de uma loja especializada em acabamentos de 6.000 metros quadrados, adjacentes a um Centro de Distribuição de 20.000 metros quadrados. Essa expansão reflete nosso compromisso em oferecer uma ampla gama de produtos e serviços, assegurando a melhor experiência de compra para nossos clientes.

Hoje, a Krepischi Lar & Construção possui quatro lojas estrategicamente localizadas em Araras, Limeira, Piracicaba e Porto Ferreira. Com um inventário de mais de 30.000 itens, nos estabelecemos como líderes em lojas de acabamento na região. Cada loja oferece um ambiente climatizado e confortável, com estacionamento próprio para os clientes.

Além disso, cada uma de nossas lojas conta com a assistência de arquitetos especializados, prontos para ajudar os clientes em suas escolhas de projeto. Esses profissionais asseguram que cada decisão seja a mais acertada, de acordo com as necessidades e estilos individuais dos clientes. A Krepischi, com sua história de pioneirismo e uma visão sempre voltada para o futuro, não se limita a vender materiais de construção; nós oferecemos uma experiência completa e enriquecedora a cada passo da jornada de compra do cliente. Conte conosco para transformar seus sonhos em realidade!

Name: Naturengen.dk - Vild vildere have (lukket)
Description:
Vild vildere have med Naturengen og Sandra Engen.

Det skal være nemt og gennemskueligt at finde forsvarligt opformerede hjemmehørende blomster- og græsfrø, når du gerne vil omdanne din have til et mekka for biodiversiteten, børnefamilien … ja, bare livet! 

Det hjælper Naturengen dig med.

Resultaterne vil sprede sig som en steppeild af liv gennem din have, haveglæden i din familie vil blomstre på måder, du ikke har oplevet det før og Jorden vil være dig taknemmelig.  

KURATERET AF NATUREN - SERVERET AF MIG ··

Alt hvad du finder hos Naturengen er udvalgt og beskrevet, så det er til at forstå. Både for dig og for de danske insekter. 

Den naturligt hjemmehørende flora og fauna står i centrum for alt, hvad jeg formidler til dig og med Naturengen ved din side, vil du lidt efter lidt lære at genkende dem - og deres fjender.

Jeg guider dig til at finde rundt i både begreber og de mest almindelige arter, mens vi sammen tilbyder dine nye insekter planter og leveforhold, de faktisk kan leve af. 

Naturaktivist eller ej; jeg lover, Naturengen kan gøre turene i både haven og naturen meget sjovere!

Tag fx den smukt illustrerede naturbog under armen, når I med net og lup drager ud for at dyrke nysgerrigheden og styrke jordforbindelsen:

“Se mor, se hvor mange græshopper der er!” “Ih, mine blomsterfrø spirer!” “Hvem sidder og suger nektar på den vilde Merian i dag?” “Hov, sikke en sjov larve - den har børster på! … hvad gemmer sig mon under træstammen i dag?” 

Med en vild have starter eventyret allerede ved havedøren.

Name: Andersons & Mulch
Description:
Andersons & Mulch combines 200 years of Andersons' experience with the quirky forward-thinking of Mulch to create a brand that provides gardeners with high-quality tools for their jobs.

Established in 1825, Andersons offer today's gardener expertly crafted tools and accessories to provide DIY, hardware and gardening centres a wider range of high-quality products at a reasonable price.

Providing a comprehensive range of high-quality and durable gardening products, Andersons covers all aspects of digging, cultivating, cutting, tidying as well as lawn care, topiary, weeding and other lighter tool and accessories.

Mulch is a bit quirky, and that's why our gloves and tools have names to make you smile but are deadly serious about quality and performance. We won't bore you with how we test for safety and performance (we do) because that is just what you would expect from a quality brand like Mulch.

How many times have you bought some gloves to discover they aren't right for the job? At Mulch, our quirky names aren't just there to make you smile, but to help you choose the right gloves for the job.  Whether it's the fiddly job of sowing seeds, pulling out those pesky weeds, or the hard graft of landscaping, we have the right gloves for the job.

Quality tools should be built to be handed down from one generation to the next.  We like to think of our Mulch tools as future family heirlooms. We guarantee our tools, so if they snap, we will repair the tool free of charge, but we're pretty confident that won't happen as they are 'spade of sterner stuff'!

Name: Ruoco Oy
Description:
Ruoco is pioneering regenerative innovation at the intersection of marine restoration and sustainable horticulture.

The Baltic Sea and other shallow marine ecosystems are suffering from decades of nutrient runoff—primarily from agriculture and other unsustainable practices. This has led to eutrophication, dead zones, and collapsing coastal ecosystems. At the same time, the horticulture industry continues to rely heavily on single-use plastic containers, contributing to climate change and biodiversity loss.

Ruoco addresses both of these urgent challenges with a single breakthrough: transforming excess coastal reed—proliferating due to nutrient overload—into high-value, fully biodegradable seedling containers. This regenerative material innovation removes nutrients from the sea and replaces harmful plastic in horticulture, offering a dual-impact solution that scales.

Our value chain model turns an ecological problem into a climate-positive, circular material with strong commercial demand. Backed by successful prototypes and industry interest, Ruoco is redefining what's possible in nutrient capture, plastic reduction, and nature-based materials innovation.

Join us in building a healthier future—rooted in the sea, grown on land.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Como eram poucos os recursos financeiros na época, começamos a negociar na sala de nossa casa. Ali só existia uma escrivaninha, uma caneta, um papel para rascunho e o SONHO de um dia ser referência para a nossa cidade e região. Em 1999, inauguramos a nossa primeira loja na Rua Pio XII, Nº 417 - Bela Vista, onde trabalhamos 6 anos com muita luta e força de vontade, e o resultado veio logo em seguida.

Em dezembro de 2005, reinauguramos a atual loja na Avenida Dr. Alfredo Barbalho Cavalcanti, Nº 75 - Primavera, com uma área de quase 3.000m².

No dia 1º de março de 2009, inauguramos a Madeireira Gigante, uma empresa filiada ao Depósito do Dante, feita para atender nossos clientes da com toda linha de madeiras, tábuas e forros.

Em 2012 inauguramos a Fábrica de Lajes e Pré-moldados Novo Horizonte, localizada na Estrada para Fortaleza, N° 1000. Onde fabricamos blocos, colunas, lajes e toda linha de pré-moldados. 

Em 2021 aprimoramos nossa fabricação de blocos de cimento, com aquisição de uma máquina industrial, na onde são fabricados blocos e canaletas em larga escala para distribuirmos em toda a região.

Hoje temos lojas em Alfenas e Campos Gerais, com mais de 10 veículos de entrega, 2 retroescavadeiras, 3 empilhadeiras, e muitos outros diferenciais que nos proporciona atender toda a região do sul de minas com eficiência e qualidade, e o mais importante, contamos com a colaboração de mais de 80 funcionários diretos e mais de 48 indiretos, ou seja participamos diretamente na geração de emprego e renda para nossa cidade.

Dante Casa & Construção - orgulho para a cidade, e referência para uma região!

Name: Upton Bark Mulch
Description:
Upton Bark Mulch makes for fine landing and long lasting gardening soil. Its tender moisture and yet smooth texture suppresses weeds as well as a good option for reducing moisture loss. 

We have been in business for 20 years delivering all across Munster. A sustainable garden product for your garden. Upton Bark mulch is a high-quality garden wood chip that can be used in a variety of landscapes and spaces, from home gardens to large public areas, such as parks, reserves and schools. It is low maintenance and has some amazing benefits including reduced time watering and weeding the area. Its dark colour blends nicely for setting gardens.

Many of our customers from Cork and beyond find bark mulch to be a great choice for small and large gardens and for areas with steep gradients.  It displays excellent resistance to compaction, bark is a useful product for high wind areas and a long-lasting mulch that will slowly breakdown and enrich the soil with nutrients, as well as improve drainage.

Garden bark mulch you choose now will have a significant impact on the health of the plants over the years to come.

Advantages
- Weed Control
- Reduces moisture loss
- Long Lasting
- Ideal for use on steep gradient
- Mulching performs a variety of functions in the garden.
- Sustainable garden soil mulch that supports all types of gardens.

Bark Mulch reduces moisture loss from the soil surface, thus aiding plant growth, and reducing the need to water. It also lessens the chance of the soil surface drying out and cracking.

If used correctly it suppresses weed growth, reducing competition for water and nutrients, and decreases the amount of ‘weeds’ the gardener has to put into maintenance.

Many types of mulch add nutrients to the soil when broken down, and improve soil structure. Mulching also reduces run-off and soil movement from garden beds. In winter it can help keep soil warmer so that plants grow a little more vigorously.

Name: Soil Depot
Description:
At Soil Depot we aim to revolutionize home gardening by offering honest soil that gardeners actually need. We sell soil, not dirt—and by that we mean, we sell soil that has the macronutrients plants need in order to grow.
While cheaper soils are offered almost everywhere, gardeners end up spending more after their dear plants die, wasting both time and money.
Keen gardeners see the difference in our soil just by looking at the texture. But we like to have a better basis so we go out and do science to our mix.
We start with absolutely only the finest soil ingredients. We go far and wide to source the highest quality compost (which required a lot of time to make) and in the process build a relationship with the compost farms which had been practicing for decades. Our soil is dark and loose not because of rice hull and charred rice hull, but because legitimate compost are loose and dark and we put plenty of the highest quality compost we can find.
We know it is quality because we use soil testing tools to verify the presence of nutrients in our ingredients. We test each ingredient, determine the NPK levels in each of them, compute and come up with a ratio of a mix that will yield medium NPK—the sweet spot for growing any plant. 
No one else obsesses with soil as much as we do.
We hope to share this passion with you.
 
 The Soil Depot Way: Soil Testing Approach to Mixing: https://fb.watch/5KU5ftzJ5i/
Testing Competitors: https://fb.watch/5KU76i9fn3/

Name: Quickcrop Ltd
Description:
At Quickcrop, we believe Growing your own food should be good for you and the planet. Since 2009, we’ve helped people embrace sustainable gardening with tools, advice, and solutions that make it simple to grow fresh fruits & vegetables the greener way.

Our mission is rooted in sustainability. By encouraging eco-friendly gardening, we help reduce the environmental footprint of food production while empowering people to connect with nature. Every raised bed, irrigation system, soil mix, or composting unit we provide is carefully chosen to support healthier gardens and a healthier planet.

We’re passionate about creating gardens that do more than feed people - they also support wildlife. From native hedging and wildflower seed mixes to ponds, bird boxes, and pollinator-friendly planting, our wildlife-friendly products and tips transform spaces into thriving ecosystems where biodiversity flourishes.

A big part of our vision is helping gardeners and businesses reduce waste and reduce food waste. Our range of composters, from small wormeries & award winning hot composters to large commercial composting solutions like the JK6200, turn kitchen scraps and garden waste into nutrient-rich compost in record time. The result? Less landfill, healthier soils, and more resilient gardens.

But we’re more than an online shop - we’re your sustainability partner & grow your own guides! Through our expert blog, videos, and responsive support, we share real-world insights on sustainable practices, wildlife gardening, and soil health. Whether you’re a first-time grower or an experienced horticulturalist, we’re here to help you grow with confidence.

At Quickcrop, every seed sown and every scrap composted builds toward a future of sustainability. Together, we can grow food, reduce waste, nurture wildlife, and live in harmony with nature.

Grow your own the greener way, with Quickcrop!
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Les ayudamos a definir sus necesidades específicas, a encontrar la mejor opción en cada momento, a descubrir nuevas soluciones e incluso a formarse, acompañándolos en cualquier etapa en que lo puedan necesitar.

Por todo ello, nuestro compromiso es el de construir y mantener relaciones comerciales sólidas, duraderas, cercanas y basadas en la confianza, para seguir siendo así la opción preferida por los profesionales de la carpintería en la región durante muchos años más.

Name: SALT Gardening Supplies
Description:
Meet SALT – Muizenberg’s New Organic Gardening haven. 

Nestled in the heart of Muizenberg, Cape Town, a fresh breeze is blowing through the gardening community. 

Welcome to SALT, a small-scale gardening supplies partner dedicated to helping you cultivate healthier soil and thriving gardens. 

SALT offers organic, nutrient-rich composts, premium soils, natural fertilizers, and high-quality mulches to gardeners of all skill levels.

Whether you’re a seasoned green thumb or just getting your hands dirty for the first time, SALT has something to help your garden flourish.

Why SALT? A New Approach to Gardening

In a world where sustainability has become more urgent than ever, SALT is stepping up to offer eco-conscious gardeners an alternative to mass-produced, chemically-laden products.

At SALT, we believe that healthy soil is the foundation of a vibrant garden. Our carefully selected organic products are designed to feed your soil, nurture your plants, and promote long-term biodiversity.

Our tagline, “Healthy Soil. Thriving Gardens.”, reflects our core mission: to help gardeners build resilient, nutrient-dense soil that can sustain lush, productive gardens year after year.


What We Offer:

Organic Compost – Rich, dark, and teeming with beneficial microorganisms, our compost will enrich your soil and give your plants the natural boost they need.

Premium Soils – Blended with care, our nutrient-rich soils are ideal for vegetable gardens, flower beds, and container plants.

Natural Fertilizers – Free from synthetic chemicals, our fertilizers are packed with essential nutrients to support strong, healthy growth.

Mulches – Suppress weeds, retain moisture, and improve soil structure with our range of organic mulches.

All our products are locally sourced, sustainably produced, and tailored to thrive in the unique climate and soil conditions of the Western Cape.

 For sales and info: 0840315355

Name: Plances
Description:
Plances ist ein Climate-Tech-Startup aus Berlin, das intelligente Bewässerungssysteme für die urbane Begrünung entwickelt. Unser Ziel ist es, Städte klimaresilienter, lebenswerter und effizienter zu machen, indem wir Begrünungsprojekte nicht nur umsetzen, sondern auch nachhaltig betreiben können.

Kern unseres Angebots ist eine solarbetriebene, autarke IoT-Steuereinheit, die sich als Plug-and-Play-Lösung in bestehende Infrastrukturen wie Stadtmöbel, Hochbeete oder Regenwasserspeicher integrieren lässt. Über unsere datengetriebene Software werden Bewässerungsprozesse prädiktiv gesteuert: Pflanzen erhalten genau dann Wasser, wenn sie es brauchen – ohne teure Sensorik, externe Strom- oder Wasseranschlüsse. Damit reduzieren wir Wartungskosten um bis zu 60 % und den Wasserverbrauch um bis zu 50 %.

Im Bereich Smart City adressiert Plances drei zentrale Herausforderungen:
Klimaanpassung: Begrünte Städte sind widerstandsfähiger gegenüber Hitze, Starkregen und Trockenperioden.
Ressourceneffizienz: Durch datenbasierte Steuerung werden knappe Ressourcen wie Wasser und Personal optimal eingesetzt.
Infrastruktur-Integration: Unsere Lösung ermöglicht eine schnelle, skalierbare Integration in bestehende urbane Systeme durch OEM-Partnerschaften.
Unsere Expertise liegt an der Schnittstelle von IoT, Datenanalyse und nachhaltiger Stadtentwicklung. Mit mehr als fünf Jahren Erfahrung in der Entwicklung und Erprobung automatischer Bewässerungssysteme haben wir ein ausgereiftes, serienreifes Produkt geschaffen. Erste Kooperationen mit Stadtmöbel-Herstellern und Kommunen zeigen die Relevanz und Nachfrage.

Wir wollen sicherstellen, dass wir urbane Begrünung, egal wie schwierig diese auch in Zukunft noch werden wird, nachhaltig, skalierbar und überall einsetzbar machen.

Werde Teil dieser Bewegung und investiere in die lebenswerten Städte von morgen.
www.plances.de

Name: Mococa Substrato
Description:
A Mococa Substrato é uma empresa líder no setor de substratos agrícolas e horticultura, dedicada a fornecer soluções de alta qualidade para agricultores, produtores e jardineiros. Com uma história de excelência, a empresa tem se destacado como parceira confiável no cultivo de plantas saudáveis e produtivas.


Nossa Missão
A missão da Mococa Substrato é fornecer substratos de primeira classe que promovam o crescimento de plantas robustas e saudáveis. Estamos comprometidos em oferecer produtos sustentáveis e inovadores que atendam às necessidades dos nossos clientes, impulsionando a agricultura ecológica e a horticultura de qualidade.


O Que Fazemos
Substratos Personalizados: Oferecemos uma ampla variedade de substratos personalizados projetados para atender às necessidades específicas de diferentes culturas e aplicações, desde estufas comerciais até hortas domésticas.

Qualidade Garantida: Investimos em pesquisa e desenvolvimento contínuos para garantir que nossos substratos atendam aos mais altos padrões de qualidade. Cada produto é formulado para maximizar a retenção de nutrientes e aeração, resultando em um ambiente de cultivo ideal.

Sustentabilidade: Comprometemo-nos com práticas sustentáveis em nossa produção, minimizando o impacto ambiental e promovendo o uso eficiente de recursos naturais.

Nosso Compromisso com os Clientes
Na Mococa Substrato, a satisfação do cliente é nossa prioridade máxima. Trabalhamos em estreita colaboração com nossos parceiros para entender suas necessidades individuais e oferecer soluções personalizadas que impulsionem o sucesso em suas atividades agrícolas e de jardinagem.

Junte-se a nós na busca por um futuro mais verde e produtivo. A Mococa Substrato está pronta para ser sua parceira confiável no cultivo de plantas saudáveis e abundantes.

Name: Rain Solution
Description:
Rain Solution biedt een oplossing tegen het verspillen van schoon drinkwater. Wij zorgen ervoor dat het regenwater op een efficiënte manier hergebruikt kan worden. Op deze manier ontlast men de waterbedrijven, wordt er een steentje bijgedragen aan het milieu en wordt de zogenoemde CO2 footprint gereduceerd. 

Met ons regenwateropvangsysteem wordt er regenwater opgevangen wat neerkomt op het dak van een huis of gebouw. Dit regenwater wordt met de regenpijp via een filter geleid naar een ondergrondse opvangbak. Deze watervoorziening kan vervolgens aangesloten worden op de volgende voorzieningen:
-	wc
-	wasmachine
-	spoelbak
-	tuinbesproeiing/waterslang

Wanneer er, in geval van droogte geen regenwater tot beschikking is, zal er doormiddel van de automatische regeling drinkwater gebruikt worden om deze voorzieningen nog steeds te laten functioneren.

Name: MycoHab Rapa Nui
Description:
Generar trabajo, alimento y techo en Isla de Pascua.
Isla de Pascua o Rapa Nui, es una isla ubicada en el Océano Pacífico Sur, sobre el extremo más oriental de la Polinesia. Considerada uno de los lugares más aislados del mundo, a unos 3800 km.

Rapa Nui es una tierra de infinita riqueza tanto natural como cultural.  Conecta con esa riqueza a través del Proyecto MycoHAB;  buscamos hacer de Isla de Pascua un lugar que impulse el empleo y brinde autonomía alimentaria a través del cultivo de hongos. Todo esto mientras se crea un biomaterial de construcción que resuelve un importante problema logístico, ecológico y ambiental.

¿Qué es el proyecto MycoHAB Rapa Nui?

MycoHAB es una iniciativa emocionante en la que SBG y el Centro de Bits y Átomos del MIT están colaborando para "cultivar" alimentos nutritivos y viviendas asequibles a partir de micelio de hongos. Estamos aprovechando la tecnología desarrollada para la NASA. El proceso utiliza materiales de desecho para crear alimentos, empleos y refugio. En Namibia, el proyecto piloto utiliza el “arbusto invasor” autóctono que está obstruyendo los acuíferos de agua natural esenciales, la vida silvestre y las tierras de pastoreo de ganado. El arbusto se cosecha para crear sustrato (alimento) para el cultivo de hongos. Se cultivan y cosechan hongos gourmet y nutritivos, y el material resultante se compacta en materiales de construcción sostenibles y ecológicos. Los edificios hechos con materiales pueden ser viviendas a precio de mercado o asequibles, refugios para refugiados, aulas escolares, salones comunitarios o FABLabs, que pueden crear nuevos Bio-Fabs y Bio-Habs.

Plus de 10 décennies consacrées à créer, fabriquer et toujours innover.

Située dans la région Bourgogne avec une forte culture du savoir-vivre,
l’entreprise est implantée près de Chablis et Auxerre au milieu du département de l’Yonne.

Spécialiste de l’ultra sur-mesure du portail en aluminium et en acier,
l’entreprise peut satisfaire, grâce à ses équipements et à son savoir-faire,
tous vos souhaits et vos désirs afin d’embellir ou de créer un univers unique
pour votre propriété.

Rothe est membre de la French Fab*.

En 2024, ROTHE FERMETURES devient ROTHE suite à son acquisition par Nicolas Garnerone.
Elle intègre ainsi le groupe GP et connaît un nouvel élan.

L’entreprise ROTHE est, et restera toujours, un moteur d’innovation
et de créativité dans l’activité de la fermeture. 
Nous portons une attention particulière à vos envies et personnalisons vos extérieurs selon vos demandes.

Bienvenue dans notre univers...

Firmamız 1977 yılında 100 m2 Nalbur Dükkanı olarak kurulmuş olup; Üçüncü kuşak firması olan onurlu yapı marketleri 44 yıldır günümüze inşaat malzemeleri ,hırdavat ,nalburiye, banyo, tesisat malzemeleri ,boya malzemeleri, bahçe ürünleri ,temizlik malzemeleri ,zücaciye ,hediyelik eşya ve kırtasiye alanlarında 55,000 ürün çeşidiyle faaliyetini sürdürmektedir.
Onurlu Yapı Marketleri 4.700 m2 kapalı satış alanı ,15.000 m2 depolama alanıyla Batı Karadeniz’in En büyük yapı marketi olma özelliğinin yanında 70 personeliyle Bolu şehrimiz için bacasız bir fabrika niteliğindedir.
Bu alanda misyonumuz müşteri memnuniyetini maksimum derecede sağlayarak perakende ve toptanda müşterimize uygun malzeme tedarik etmek, müşterimizin işini kolaylaştıracak hizmetler sunmak, ev için, işyeri için,bahçe için ihtiyaç duyulan tüm ürünlerin bulunurluğunu sağlama çabasındayız. Güler yüzlü ve kaliteli hizmetle beraber bilgili ve donanımlı uzman personelimizle tüm alanda müşterilerimize fayda ve yarar sağlama düşüncesi bizim faaliyetimizin ilham kaynağını oluşturmuştur.
Vizyonumuz Bolunun bir marka değeri olan onurlu yapı marketlerini perakende mağazacılık sektöründe Ulusal bir markaya dönüşümünü sağlamaktır. Kurumsal iş yapısı ve sadık müşteri portföyünü daha da geliştirerek Bolu’ya mal olmuş Onurlu Yapı Marketini markalaşma yolunda en iyi seviyelere taşıma isteği ve arzusundayız.

Name: POCHICHE
Description:
Hace más de 70 años, en el corazón de Molina de Segura, nació un pequeño almacén con un gran propósito: ayudar a construir hogares, negocios y sueños.

En aquellos tiempos, Luciano García Puche, un hombre trabajador y visionario, decidió abrir un espacio donde albañiles, arquitectos y familias pudieran encontrar todo lo necesario para dar forma a sus proyectos. Así nació Pochiche Materiales de Construcción.

Al principio, era un negocio humilde: unas cuantas palas, ladrillos, sacos de cemento y mucha ilusión. Pero lo que realmente hizo crecer a Pochiche fue su trato cercano y el compromiso de ofrecer calidad, buen precio y confianza. Los clientes sabían que, al cruzar la puerta, siempre encontrarían asesoramiento, apoyo y soluciones.

Valores que nos definen
•	Honestidad, porque cada cliente merece la mejor opción.
•	Calidad, porque los materiales construyen no solo paredes, sino historias.
•	Cercanía, porque sabemos que cada obra es única y personal.
Hoy, en Pochiche, seguimos creciendo. Nos adaptamos a los nuevos tiempos, incorporamos nuevas tecnologías y materiales más sostenibles, pero sin perder nuestra esencia: ser ese almacén de confianza que te acompaña desde el primer ladrillo hasta el último detalle.
Porque en cada casa, en cada edificio, en cada reforma… hay un pedacito de Pochiche. Y lo que empezó siendo un pequeño almacén familiar, hoy es una gran familia de clientes, proveedores y amigos.
En Pochiche “Más que materiales, construimos historias.”
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment
Location: Molina de Segura, Región de Murcia

Name: C&C Technik
Description:
With over 30 years of experience, C&C Technik has built a strong reputation in Malta as a leading supplier of high-quality tools and industrial products. Originally founded to represent reputable tool brands and deliver exceptional aftersales service, the company has since grown significantly under the ownership of the Salvo Grima Group. Today, we offer an extensive portfolio of over 45 internationally-renowned brands from various industries, including aviation, maritime, construction, engineering, and agriculture.

Our state-of-the-art 900sqm facility in Qormi serves as a hub for our expanding team and product range, providing both professionals and businesses with top-tier tools and industrial solutions. A cornerstone of our success is our unwavering commitment to superior aftersales service, ensuring that our clients receive ongoing support long after a purchase is made.

In addition to our retail services, C&C Technik has developed a strong distribution network that serves hardware stores and tradespeople across multiple sectors. We pride ourselves on delivering the right products to meet the specific needs of our diverse customer base, helping to optimize their work and enhance productivity.

We also offer comprehensive tool repair and maintenance services. Our skilled technicians are equipped to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs, ensuring that our clients’ tools remain in optimal condition over time.

Recognizing that not all tools need to be purchased, we offer a specialized tool rental service. Customers can rent a wide range of tools and heavy machinery for short-term projects, providing a cost-effective alternative for those with one-off needs.

At C&C Technik, our focus on quality, service, and innovation continues to drive our success. We are dedicated to meeting the evolving needs of our clients and industries, ensuring that we remain Malta’s go-to destination for tools and industrial supplies.

Name: Casa da construção
Description:
A Conexão Atacadista é fruto do trabalho de um empreendedor e visionário chamado Edson Feliciano. De origem muito pobre e órfão desde os 10 anos de idade, Edson veio para Brasília para buscar o crescimento pessoal e profissional. Encontrou solo fértil para suas ideias e projetos. Alfabetizado aos 18 anos de idade, ele conseguiu ainda se graduar em ciências contábeis aos 30 anos pela universidade do Distrito Federal sendo neste período já casado e pai de dois filhos.
Seus projetos foram crescendo e em 1993 tomou a drástica e difícil decisão de sua vida. Deixou o emprego fixo e estável para realizar o tão esperado sonho de ser empresário, com pouco dinheiro e sob grande pressão de não poder fracassar devido aos filhos e família que dependiam dele, conseguiu fundar a sua primeira bodega em Samambaia, Distrito Federal, uma cidade satélite onde não havia sequer saneamento básico ou asfalto. Desde então o empresário cresceu nos negócios e introduziu seus dois filhos na operação, Gustavo e Juliana. Com o apoio dos dois decidiu entrar para o time dos “grandes”, neste momento idealizaram juntos e criaram a Conexão Atacadista, empresa que hoje atende construtoras e revendas de materiais de construção. Possui 1.100m² com pé direito de 5 metros, mix de mais de 4 mil itens e diversas marcas de linha e foco 100% centrado na diferenciação por inovação.

STALREM od ponad 20 lat zajmuje się dystrybucją drzwi oraz bram renomowanych producentów. Klienci odwiedzający oddziały zlokalizowane w całej Polsce znajdą u nas produkty m.in.: Porta, DRE, Inter Door, POL-SKONE, Erkado, Gerda, Intenso-Doors, Voster, CAL, WIKĘD.

Obsługujemy klientów indywidualnych, a także salony sprzedaży oraz firmy zajmujące się inwestycjami mieszkaniowymi czy przemysłowymi.
USŁUGI:
Serwis drzwi - zajmujemy się serwisem drzwi, zarówno w ramach gwarancji, jak i pogwarancyjnym. Realizujemy także usługi okołoserwisowe. Nasi certyfikowani serwisanci wykonują usługi: 
awaryjnego małoinwazyjnego otwierania drzwi | regulacji drzwi i samozamykaczy | montażu i demontażu okuć, okładzin i ościeżnic | wymiany uszczelek i zamków drzwiowych | napraw każdego rodzaju drzwi | wymiany drzwi z doradztwem technicznym.

Bezpłatny pomiar - Nasze salony oferują usługę bezpłatnego pomiaru gwarantującego zakup drzwi o odpowiednich wymiarach oraz wstępnej wyceny stolarki. 
Montaż stolarki - Oferujemy bezpłatny transport do miejsca wskazanego w dokumentacji zakupowej, a także profesjonalne usługi montażu drzwi i okien, zapewniające dodatkowy okres gwarancji na zakupione u nas produkty oraz rabat w wysokości 15% wartości całego zamówienia.

One wax refill lasts eight hours, equal to six bags of kiln-dried logs. Bringing you the ultimate experience of warmth, ambience and worry-free fires. Our selection of firepits promises high performance, low emissions, and a virtually smoke-free evening.

We have a range of firepits to suit almost any taste and size of outdoor area.

We take great pleasure in saying that we produce the Most Eco-Friendly Firepit the world has ever seen.

Name: Rebâtir Maine
Description:
A travers le projet Rebâtir Maine, soutenu par l’Etat et la Région Pays de la Loire en tant que lauréat d’un Appel à projets de l’ADEME, nous souhaitons contribuer à la préservation de nos ressources dans le secteur du bâtiment à travers le réemploi des matériaux et une amélioration de la valorisation des matières, à travers le recyclage de menuiseries vitrées et le tri de déchets de chantier.

En favorisant l’utilisation de gisements présents sur le bassin local, le réemploi des matériaux permet de répondre à des enjeux divers : environnementaux, sociaux, économiques et réglementaires. 

Au niveau environnemental, le réemploi limite l’extraction de ressources naturelles, l’utilisation d’énergie et les émissions de Gaz à Effet de Serre, tout en réduisant la quantité de déchets, les dépôts sauvages et la saturation des déchetteries. 

Les activités de réemploi des matériaux contribuent socialement au notre projet social de l’Ensemblier ENVIE Maine en favorisant la création d’emplois en insertion non-délocalisables et le développement de savoir-faire nouveaux. 

Ce projet participe également à apporter des solutions à des problématiques économiques émergentes : hausse des coûts de gestion de déchets, risques de pénuries et hausse des prix des matériaux. Le réemploi permet aussi de répondre à des enjeux réglementaires divers (loi AGEC 2020, diagnostic PEMD sur les opérations de démolition et réhabilitation, obligation du tri 7 flux des déchets, mise en place de la filière pollueurs-payeurs (REP), RE 2020).

Lorsque le réemploi n’est pas possible, il est essentiel d’optimiser la valorisation des déchets. 

Une activité de démantèlement de menuiseries vitrées a aussi été créée pour séparer les matériaux (verre, bois, PVC, aluminium) et leur permettre d’être intégrés dans les nouvelles productions de menuiseries.

Notre quête ? Resserrer les liens entre les scieries de nos régions et vous, professionnels et particuliers, en quête d’authenticité et de responsabilité.

Choisir Bois de Chez Vous, c’est opter pour la meilleure essence de bois local, soigneusement sélectionnée pour répondre à vos projets les plus audacieux. Que vous rêviez de parquets élégants, de bardages robustes, de lambris chaleureuses, de terrasses accueillantes ou simplement de bois brut pour donner vie à vos idées, nous avons ce qu’il vous faut. 

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure et devenez acteur d’un changement positif.  Ensemble, façonnons un monde où le bois redevient le héros de nos intérieurs et extérieurs, tout en préservant la planète et l’âme de nos forêts.

Se pot monta în gips-carton, dar și în zidărie (cărămidă, BCA, blocheți ipsos, silicat etc) ori în beton. Se pot confecționa LA ORICE DIMENSIUNI aveți nevoie, se livrează ULTRARAPID, ORIUNDE în România sau străinătate! 
Trapele de vizitare profesionale UNISISTEM sunt cu sau fără specificații la foc (EI30 - EI90), destinate tuturor spațiilor publice unde scenariul ISU prevede clar specificații la foc: grădinițe, școli, spitale, clădiri birouri, hoteluri, restaurante, supermarketuri, mall-uri, benzinării, muzee, primării etc.
Trapele de vizitare speciale UNISISTEM sunt fie cu izolare fonică superioară (SILENTBOARD), fie cu protecție la radiații X (Roentgen) ori pentru spații cu umiditate ridicată (băi, cabine de duș, spălătorii, bucătării, spații tehnice insuficient ventilate, parcări interioare, stații de metrou, subsoluri, garaje, balcoane, terase, grătare, șeminee etc).
Trapele profesionale și speciale UNISISTEM se pot finisa aidoma peretelui sau tavanului dvs: fie simplă lavabilă, fie tencuială decorativă, ori tapet, piatră naturală, marmură, granit, travertin, klinker, faianță etc.
Sună la 0744.335.446 (telefon, whatsapp, telegram, sms) ori intră pe www.trapedevizitare.ro și solicită cea mai bună cotație de preț pentru dimensiunile trapei tale și o vei primi ULTRARAPID, ORIUNDE în România sau afară! Ca pizza...

Our Values
We treat all our customers and suppliers with respect, honesty and kindness. We put the customer first every time.

We look after the environment by applying the principles of good stewardship, recycling and resourcefulness in everything we do.

Name: Bigmat Claramunt
Description:
BigMat Claramunt és una empresa familiar de més de deu treballadors, destinada a la venta de materials de construcció i decoració. Forma part del grup multinacional europeu BigMat, una xarxa internacional d’empreses de petit, mitjà i gran format, líder al territori nacional i amb presència a França, Bèlgica, Itàlia, Portugal, República Txeca, Eslovàquia i Xipre. Aquesta multinacional es caracteritza per la recerca constant de millores i innovació de productes, equipaments i serveis per a professionals de la construcció. Al 2021 aquest grup va adquirir La Plataforma de la Construcción, fet que va suposar que es convertís en la segona empresa més gran d’Espanya de venta de materials de construcció.

Som una referència en el món de la construcció i decoració des de 1930 a Calella i proximitats. Ens dirigim a un mercat ben ampli, des de clients particulars a arquitectes, interioristes i grans empreses i xarxes hoteleres.

Disposem d’unes instal·lacions de més de 6.000 m2 amb més de 800 m2 d’exposició. Actualment, l’empresa està dividida en tres línies de treball: el sector de la decoració, el de serveis i equipaments per a constructors i el de magatzem amb productes per a la construcció.  

Ens caracteritza el nostre tracte de proper i individualitzat cap a la nostra clientela, de forma honesta i empàtica, relacionat amb la proximitat que una empresa familiar ofereix, però amb un caràcter dinàmic i professional.

 Nezávislé na rostlinách pro extrémně dlouhou životnost a snadnou údržbu
 Naddimenzovaná filtrace
 Jednoduchý, přesně definovaný způsob výstavby
 Unifikované řešení pro širokou škálu tvarů bazénů a jezírek



Na biobazén lze nahlížet jako na zásobník velmi kvalitní užitkové vody. Chemicky neošetřená a přesto čistá voda přímo na vašem pozemku.
