Proto se soustředíme na skutečnou funkčnost, životnost a snažíme se eliminovat nutnost jakýchkoli dalších zásahů do realizace v následujících desetiletích.

Pro zděné bazény nabízíme speciální fólii bez ftalátů a toxických příměsí v designech odpovídajících přirozené barvě a vzhledu vody.

Name: Ironbark Timber
Description:
Ironbark Timber is one of the largest independently owned timber yards in South East Queensland, dispatching up to 100 tonnes of timber every day. Supplying government departments, builders, structural landscapers, engineers and home handymen, Ironbark delivers timber throughout the east coast of Australia. 
We handle exterior grade structural hardwood and pine, commercial decking, hardwood and pine fencing, power poles and certified building poles,decking timber, timber bollards, tongue and groove flooring, sleepers and garden edging. 
Ironbark Timber Products specialises in Queensland-sourced Royal species hardwoods such as Ironbark, Spotted Gum, Grey Gum and other Class 1 & 2 inground rated species which perform better in our climate than southern-sourced species. 
Our structural hardwood products are cut to AS2082-2007 standards (Visually Stress-Graded Hardwood) by our qualified timber graders. Grades include F14, F17, F22 and F27, in Green Off Saw. Sizes start from 50×25 to 300×100 and are cut in increments of 300mm. All of our exterior hardwood products are treated with Tanalised Ecowood (Tan-E) to either hazard level H3 or H4. This process is safe to use and is specified for use in all government buildings, playground equipment and schoolyards. 
Ironbark also stocks a complete range of hardware associated with the timber products we sell, including batten screws, stirrups, timber connectors, screws and gun nails, along with preservatives, stains and finishes for various timbers.
A family business owned by Simon and Kylie Brady, Ironbark Timbers began operations in 1980. The company has been trusted as the timber supplier for many major projects including the Yarra River Boardwalk in Melbourne, the Noosa Main beach Boardwalk, Hope Island Marina on the Gold Coast, and interesting projects at Taronga Zoo in Sydney, Western Plains Zoo at Dubbo and Australia Zoo on the Sunshine Coast.

Det doftar brädgård om A:et och har så gjort för åtskilliga generationer kunder. Även om XL-BYGG tillhör framtiden har vi i företagsnamnet inte velat släppa kopplingen till bröderna Ernst William och Johan Oskar Abrahamssons livsverk. Det som började med en trävarufirma i slutet av 1800-talet i Landskrona är sedan 2009 en del av Skandinaviens största bygghandelskedja, vilket ur kundperspektiv ger många fördelar: bra priser, säkra leveranser och garanterade kvaliteter. XL-BYGG A-TRÄ lever sannerligen upp till att kallas en riktig bygghandel. Vi vågar påstå att vi har branschens kunnigaste medarbetare. Vi kan därför ge våra kunder en service och ett stöd som få kan matcha: Köp en vara hos oss så bjuder vi på kunskapen. Det är så vi formulerat vår affärsfilosofi.

Mit Drain haben wir eine einfache und doch innovative Drainage auf den Markt gebracht, die es jedem ermöglicht seine Pflanzen vor Überwässerung zu schützen. Ob Hobbygärtner oder Pflanzen Experte, Drain bietet ein langfristiges Tool, einfach gesunde Pflanzen zu haben. Unser Anspruch ist es, nachhaltige, effektive und nutzerfreundliche Produkte auf den Markt zu bringen, weswegen wir ausschließlich regional und mit recycelten Materialien arbeiten. 
Verantwortungsbewusstsein fängt bei der Produktkonzeption an und hört bei dem Product-Lifecycle auf. 
Deswegen kann Drain beliebig oft verwendet werden und ist mit allen Übertöpfen kompatibel, um dem Kunden einen langfristigen Nutzen zu ermöglichen.

Description:
Okna Design – Twój partner w nowoczesnych rozwiązaniach dla nieruchomości

Czym się zajmujemy?

Oferujemy szeroką gamę produktów i usług dla klientów indywidualnych oraz biznesowych:
 Okna i drzwi: nowoczesne systemy okienne i drzwiowe o wysokiej izolacyjności termicznej i akustycznej.
 Rolety zewnętrzne i wewnętrzne: zapewniające komfort, prywatność i oszczędność energii.
 Moskitiery: skuteczna ochrona przed owadami.
 Doradztwo i montaż: kompleksowa obsługa – od wyboru idealnych rozwiązań po profesjonalny montaż.

Dlaczego warto wybrać Okna Design?

 Jakość i trwałość – współpracujemy wyłącznie z renomowanymi producentami, gwarantując niezawodność naszych produktów.
 Indywidualne podejście – dopasowujemy nasze rozwiązania do potrzeb Twojej nieruchomości i stylu życia.
 Profesjonalny serwis – służymy wsparciem na każdym etapie współpracy, oferując fachowe doradztwo i montaż.
 Energooszczędność – pomagamy obniżyć koszty ogrzewania i klimatyzacji dzięki nowoczesnym technologiom.

Dla kogo działamy?

Obsługujemy zarówno klientów indywidualnych, którzy chcą zadbać o komfort swojego domu, jak i przedsiębiorców poszukujących funkcjonalnych rozwiązań dla biur, lokali usługowych czy innych nieruchomości komercyjnych.

Okna Design – tworzymy przestrzenie, w których funkcjonalność spotyka się z estetyką.

A complete all-in-one 100% certified organic fertiliser and soil conditioner powered by live microbes for all plants, fruit, vegetables, herbs, gardens and lawns.

With zero negative impact on plants, lawns and soils, it eliminates the risk of soil acidification and nitrogen runoff into our waterways.

Earthfood is made through an innovative manufacturing procedure that turns organic raw materials into an environmentally safe, natural liquid microbial inoculant, micronutrient, and soil conditioner. Suitable for all plant types producing healthier fruit, vegetables, gardens, and plants resulting in healthier people and a healthier planet.

Our product will not burn, is non-toxic, and non-polluting. Is easy to use and can be applied with a spray bottle or watering can. When using our Earthfood no additional products are required to keep your plants strong and healthy.

Independently tested and proven with outstanding results.

Name: Gumideck SK & CZ
Description:
Gumideck je moderný systém terasových podláh, ktorý vznikol z jednoduchej myšlienky:
terasa nemá byť starosť, má byť priestor na život.

Ponúkame dve riešenia, ktoré spájajú dizajn, technológiu a dlhú životnosť:
• Thermowood : prémiové drevo z termojaseňa
• WPC kompozit : bezúdržbová alternatíva pre moderné domy

Oba systémy stoja na patente, gumené montážne konektory, ktoré umožňujú rýchlu a čistú pokládku bez pílenia, bez odpadu a bez potreby špeciálnych nástrojov. Terasu si dokáže poskladať každý: profesionál aj domáci majster.

Náš cieľ je jednoduchý:
priniesť ľuďom krásnu terasu, ktorá vydrží roky, nevyžaduje takmer žiadnu starostlivosť a dokáže odolať aj náročným podmienkam stredoeurópskeho podnebia.

Kde Gumideck funguje najlepšie

• Balkóny
• Rodinné terasy
• Terasy s hydroizoláciou
• Záhradné prestrešenia a oddychové zóny
• Rekreačné objekty, wellness, altánky

Prečo si ľudia vyberajú Gumideck

• rýchla pokládka bez stavebného zásahu
• žiadne skrutky, žiadne triesky, žiadne kompromisy
• prémiový vzhľad a prírodné materiály
• nízka údržba a dlhá životnosť
• dostupnosť cez náš e-shop s okamžitým odoslaním

Od roku 2016 prinášame terasy, ktoré menia spôsob, akým ľudia pracujú s exteriérom.
Gumideck nie je len materiál. Je to modulárny systém, ktorý dáva každému možnosť vytvoriť si vlastný priestor pre oddych, rodinu a krásu.

บริษัท อินโน-คอนส์ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด มีเป้าประสงค์ที่จะต้องการเป็นผู้พัฒนาสินค้าและบริการ เพื่อให้สินค้าที่ออกสู่ตลาดในนามบริษัท อินโน-คอนส์ (ประเทศไทย) จำกัด เป็น ที่ไว้วางใจให้กับ บริษัท องค์กร ร้านค้า ที่นำไปใช้งาน หรือเป็นตัวแทนจำหน่าย เราจึงมีการเพิ่มบุคคลากร ทั้งฝ่ายสำนักงาน ฝ่ายผลิต เพื่อตอบรับกับความต้อง การของตลาดในปัจจุบัน เรามีการขยายพื้นที่การจัดส่ง สินค้าออกไปทั่วประเทศพร้อมทั้งตั้งจุดกระจายสินค้า ของตัวเอง ด้วยเหตุที่กล่าวมาทั้งหมด เราได้รับเลือก ให้นำสินค้าประเภทสกรูปลายสว่านเข้าไปจำหน่ายใน ไทวัสดุแต่เพียงผู้เดียว ในขณะที่ตัวแทนขายปลีก ก็ยังมีปริมาณในการสั่งซื้อสินค้าเพิ่มขึ้นอย่างต่อเนื่อง และองค์กรที่นำผลิตภัณฑ์ของเราไปใช้ก็ยังไว้วางใจ ให้เราดูแลและเป็นที่ปรึกษาในด้านการติดตั้งอย่าง เสมอมา

Name: Ambler Coal Building Supply
Description:
Originally a coal and masonry yard, Ambler Coal was first located at Maple & Oak streets in Ambler. Coal was picked up daily and stored in the bins at the yard to be delivered to the homes of local families. In the mid-1940s, heating oil replaced coal as a more popular automatic heat source.

In order to keep employees busy during the remainder of the year, Ambler Coal expanded the masonry supply yard. We are now the premier stucco distributor in the area and have introduced several stone veneer brands to the Southeastern Pennsylvania market.

Today, Ambler Coal Building Supply is one of the area's largest suppliers of stone veneer, brick veneer and stucco products.

We are located in Ambler, Pennsylvania (PA), and serve customers in Montgomery County, Bucks County, Delaware County, Philadelphia County, and surrounding areas in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Delaware.

We welcome customers:
Monday-Friday 7:30 am - 5:00 pm

Name: PCK Belgium BV
Description:
PCK Belgium is een Belgisch gevestigd bedrijf. Het werd opgericht in Juni 2012, maar bezit een expertise van veertig jaar op het vlak van afwateringstechniek. 
In Mei 2018 werd ons verkoopkantoor in Vancouver (Canada) geopend om de Noord-Amerikaanse markt te betreden. 

Onze producten, de stijlvolle Star-Drain en Aqua-Drain series, worden momenteel geproduceerd in drie afmetingen voor al je afwateringsbehoeften. Alle producten die we hebben ontwikkeld, zijn van hoogstaande kwaliteit en worden verwerkt met de meest moderne technieken. 

In 2023 hebben wij ook besloten om ons gamma uit te breiden naar meer design en dit in RVS (roestvrij staal) 

Wij hebben ook een nieuw zwart toegevoegd, Premium Black. Dit zwart heeft een ruwer kantje maar nog altijd heel aantrekkelijk om te installeren als lijnafwatering. 

PCK Belgium weet dat het, dankzij zijn keuze van de ruwe grondstoffen pvc en aluminium, kwaliteitsproducten levert die de tand des tijds zullen doorstaan. 

PCK Belgium heeft de faciliteiten die het in staat stellen om leveringen te consolideren met verschillende producten, waardoor zijn klanten een grotere mate van flexibiliteit hebben wat betreft de voorraad.

Name: California Turf Equipment

As a company that values innovation and sustainability, we are constantly on the lookout for eco-friendly alternatives to benefit both our customers and the environment. Dengan tim yang berpengalaman dan jaringan kemitraan yang solid, PT Awi Jaya Indotama terus berupaya menjadi bagian dari pembangunan sistem perpipaan yang efisien, aman, dan berkelanjutan. Kami percaya, hubungan bisnis yang kuat dibangun dari kepercayaan, konsistensi, dan hasil nyata.
Itulah nilai yang terus kami pegang dalam setiap proyek yang kami jalankan.

Name: Melgol
Description:
Melgol specializes in the import, marketing, and distribution of sealing and insulation products for the construction industry, dealing with leading manufacturers across Israel and around the world. As the import arm of A. Halpern, one of Israel’s most experienced insulation and waterproofing experts, constantly seeks out the best and most innovative solutions in the field, ensuring that we offer our clients the optimal versatile systems adapted to their evolving needs.

These innovative solutions include utility roofs – a feature that is rapidly growing in popularity around the world, as people seek to use their rooftops for a variety of eco-friendly, space-saving purposes, including mounting solar panels. 

Melgol establishes the infrastructure for three main types of utility roofs:

•	Green Roof – A rooftop garden, requiring various drainage and other systems.
•	Blue Roof – Rooftop rainwater storage, involving an advanced management system.
•	Integrated (Blue-Green) Roof – A combination of these two rooftop concepts.

These utility roofs offer many benefits for both residences and businesses, helping to create an attractive green space while improving water efficiency and reducing the risk of flooding and water damage during heavy rain. Of course, they must always be based on the correct infrastructure and waterproofing. 

Thanks to our cooperation with A. Halperin, we can establish utility roof infrastructure that is a seamless part of the entire construction project from the very beginning, just like waterproofing and insulation. This simplifies the entire process for developers, architects, engineers, landscapers, and other professionals.

Interested in a utility roof for your next project? Visit us at www.melgol.co.il to learn more.

A Casa e Luz é uma loja de iluminação criada pelos irmãos, Patric Feitosa Santana e William Feitosa Santana que possuem mais de 20 anos de experiência no ramo. 

Em 2018, eles decidiram abrir sua própria loja para oferecer as melhores soluções luminotécnicas, fornecendo produtos de alta qualidade e a preços acessíveis.

Contamos com uma equipe treinada de consultores de vendas que buscam se aproximar cada vez mais dos nossos clientes e prezam pelo cuidado desde o atendimento. 

A Casa e Luz se baseia em uma política de ética e honestidade desde o início.

Oferecemos uma ampla variedade de lâmpadas, luminárias, lustres e outros produtos de iluminação, todos selecionados com o máximo cuidado para garantir a satisfação de nossos clientes. Além disso, somos apaixonados por iluminação e acreditamos que ela é um elemento fundamental para criar ambientes agradáveis e acolhedores. 

Por isso, oferecemos um atendimento personalizado e especializado para ajudar nossos clientes a escolherem a opção de iluminação ideal para cada ambiente.

Acreditamos que a iluminação é mais do que apenas uma fonte de luz, é um elemento que pode transformar completamente um ambiente e criar uma atmosfera única. 

A iluminação também é um elemento fundamental para decorar um espaço, pois pode destacar e valorizar os objetos decorativos, revestimentos e cores. Sem ela, nenhum projeto de interiores está completo. 

Visite-nos e descubra como a iluminação pode deixar sua casa ainda mais bonita e acolhedora.

Dal 1981 Professionisti della vendita, assistenza e riparazioni attrezzature per il giardinaggio STIHL e HONDA.

L'attività iniziò per vendere e riparare macchine agricole, ma nel corso degli anni il settore dell'agricolo così come quello della silvicultura hanno subito molti cambiamenti portando FAV a specializzarsi sempre di più sulle macchine da giardino professionali e hobbistiche, che costituiscono oggi la principale attività. 
Oggi FAV dispone di due punti vendita, la sede storica di Somma Lombardo ed il negozio di Besozzo, con un team di 13 persone, formato da 7 tecnici e 6 tra addetti alle vendite, commerciali e amministrativi, in costante crescita.

FAV è rivenditore specializzato STIHL da oltre trent'anni, ricevendo molte certificazioni tra cui l'assegnazione della "QUALITÀ ORO", a conferma della professionalità e del cura nel servizio che ci contraddistingue da oltre 40 anni.

Наше завдання – зробити Ваш процес будівництва максимально комфортним. Кожен замовник для нас важливий, тому ми забезпечуємо розрахунки конструкцій, здійснюємо доставку товару за місцем призначення та шукаємо технічні рішення питань, що виникають в процесі співпраці.

Name: ARS Tools Australia
Description:
ARS Tools are a world leading brand in high-quality japanese steel tools for horticulture professionals and gardening enthusiasts alike. 

Since 1876 ARS Tools have been designed and produced in Japan with three things in mind: strength, flexibility and functional beauty. In Latin "ars" refers to art, skill or craft - the ability to create something skilfully and the root of the English word "art". ARS Tools are where art and horticultural tools intersect - giving passionate horticulturalists the tools to create and shape. 

ARS Tools are proudly distributed in Australia by Woodchuck Horticulture Products, making them available to select networks of gardening, agriculture and horticulture outlets for direct sale.

Name: UMBRA CASEI by Inua Ideas & Solutions SRL
Description:
Am inceput activitatea in acest domeniu in anul 2009 si de atunci am urmat cu tenacitate calea spre invatare si dezvoltare, parcurgand etapele, urmarind tendintele pietei, modul in care schimba nevoile și tendințele arhitecturale sau preferintele si am invatat sa ascultam pentru a intelege, iar povestea merge mai departe.

Experienta si portofoliul de produse ne ajuta azi sa oferim solutii adaptate nevoilor si bugetelor clientilor nostri si sa ne permita sa alegem atent solutiile din fiecare proiect. 

Cum perceptia calitatii si gusturile sunt diferite din punct de vedere functional, estetic, cat si perspectiva beneficiilor cumulate, am ales sa punem accentul pe flexibilitate, comunicare, transparenta si respect, dar fara a face rabat la calitatea materialelor. Folosim doar solutii profesionale, concepute pentru a oferi performanta ridicata si facute sa dureze in timp.

Toti ne dorim sa facem alegerile potrivite si cautam referintele necesare pentru a ne oferi acest confort in luarea deciziilor. 
Cand discutam de investii pe termen lung si care insumeaza bugete de achizitii importante, alegerile nu se fac usor si repede, iar informarea si increderea sunt esentiale. 
Cunoastem sentimentul pentru ca acelasi lucru il cautam si noi la partenerii nostri si astfel va incurajam sa va faceti achizitiile in cunostinta de cauza. 

Noi va oferim produse destinate umbririi, acoperirilor si inchiderilor de terasa.

Toate aceste se pot traduce simplu in produse precum copertine retractabile sau fixe, pergole retractabile sau fixe, acoperisuri din sticla, sisteme de rulouri, jaluzele, umbrele si sisteme zip screen.

Avem un portofoliu de produse de interior si exterior ce se adreseaza proiectelor de tip rezidential, spatiilor de birouri, spatiilor horeca si industriale.

Livram doar produse profesionale realizate la comanda, conform specificatiilor fiecarui proiect, din materiale performante ce ofera eficienta, siguranta in exploatare si cu durata de viata peste medie

Name: Van Diest Beersel
Description: In 1924 richtte Julien Van Diest zijn bedrijf 'Van Diest' op in Halle. Initieel specialiseerde hij zich in de teelt en verkoop van plantaardappelen. Sinds enkele jaren is Van Diest verhuisd naar Beersel omdat de originele winkel in Halle te klein werd. Maar ondanks de ruimere winkel, is de familiaire sfeer waar Van Diest voor gekend staat, behouden gebleven. Deze kernwaarde werd van Julien overgedragen naar zijn dochter Martha, wie het dan weer doorgaf aan haar dochter Julienne. En vandaag de dag, vier generaties later, is het bedrijf in handen van de achterkleinzoon Joris. Het assortiment strekt zich nu uit van allerhande tuingereedschap (Stihl, EGO...)  tot verscheidene outdoor cooking benodigdheden (Weber, Ofyr, Big Green Egg...). Van Diest specialiseert zich daarbovenop op automatische grasmaaiers (Husqvarna en Segway).

Name: Sukabumi greenstone
Description:
Welcome to Nusagri CV! We are exporters of Sukabumi Greenstone, specializing in exterior/interior wall and pool flooring solutions. Our carefully selected stone, sourced from the Sukabumi district in Indonesia, offers unique benefits for swimming pools.

Sukabumi Greenstone holds the secret of Zeolite, a purifying agent that cleanses pool water by absorbing heavy metals, contaminants, and odors. By incorporating our stone into your pool, you can enjoy a cleaner and healthier swimming environment.

Our Green Sukabumi Stone showcases captivating color variations, appearing bright green when dry and slightly darker when wet. This color transformation adds depth and versatility to pool applications.

Apart from its color-changing feature, Sukabumi Greenstone possesses exceptional characteristics. It boasts an attractive green color, strength, resistance to pressure, and resilience to temperature changes. With a Mohs hardness rating of 6-7, it offers durability and effective water absorption. The stone is also resistant to common pool chemicals, termites, and insects. We ensure consistent thickness, cool temperature, non-abrasive surface, minimal color fading, intense green color radiance, resistance to moss or algae growth, and the ability to dissolve unwanted minerals in water.

With over 30 years of exporting experience from our own factory in West Java, Indonesia, our products have reached global markets. We have served clients in Malaysia, Singapore, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam, Taiwan, China, Japan, Bangladesh, Pakistan, India, and Egypt.

At Nusagri CV, we are eager to establish mutually beneficial relationships to expand the Sukabumi Greenstone market. Please feel free to reach out for further information.

Name: Mal-Drew
Description:
Internetowa hurtownia budowlana oraz sklep budowlany w Gliwicach i Rybniku. 

 Twoje Źródło Materiałów Budowlanych i Narzędzi od 1984

Od ponad trzech dekad Maldrew zaopatruje profesjonalistów i klientów indywidualnych w najwyższej jakości materiały budowlane oraz narzędzia. Nasza firma jest dumna z długotrwałego zaangażowania w dostarczanie najlepszych rozwiązań w branży budowlanej.

Nasza Oferta:
 Hurtownia Budowlana: Nasze hurtownie w Gliwicach i Rybniku oferują szeroki asortyment materiałów budowlanych, dostosowany do potrzeb nawet najbardziej wymagających projektów. Jesteśmy partnerem wykonawców, dostarczając im niezbędne narzędzia do osiągania sukcesu.

 Sklep Narzędziowy: Nasz sklep to raj dla profesjonalistów i pasjonatów majsterkowania. Oferujemy różnorodne narzędzia i akcesoria, które ułatwiają wszelkiego rodzaju prace.

 Sklep Internetowy: W roku 2017 wychodzimy naprzeciw oczekiwaniom naszych klientów i zakładamy internetowy sklep budowlany, by zapewnić jeszcze wygodniejsze zakupy.

W ofercie sklepu internetowego Mal-Drew znajdziesz: 

Materiały Budowlane
Pokrycia Dachowe 
Docieplenia 
Sucha Zabudowa
Chemia Budowlana
Narzędzia i Artykuły BHP

Nasza Misja
Naszym głównym celem jest zapewnienie Ci bezproblemowego przebiegu projektu budowlanego. 
Niezależnie od tego, czy potrzebujesz porady dotyczącej wyboru odpowiednich materiałów, czy masz pytania związane z procesem budowlanym, zawsze możesz polegać na naszej wiedzy i doświadczeniu. 

Rok 1984 to początek naszej pasji do dostarczania najwyższej jakości materiałów budowlanych. W tamtych trudnych czasach, kiedy zasoby były ograniczone, a wyzwania polityczne dominowały, zrozumieliśmy, jak ważna jest infrastruktura dla rozwoju społecznego i gospodarczego. Od tego momentu nasza firma dążyła do dostarczania niezbędnych materiałów.

Pamiętaj...
Buduj Taniej i Łatwiej z Maldrew!

At Flowmate, we believe that home maintenance should be simple, effective, and hassle-free. That's why we've created a smarter alternative —one that eliminates blockages, reduces maintenance, and keeps rainwater flowing exactly where it should.

Traditional gutter guards trap debris instead of stopping it, leading to clogs, overflow, and costly damage. Flowmate changes the game with a clever, low-maintenance solution that allows water to flow freely while keeping leaves and debris out of your downpipes. It’s an easy install, works with most existing systems, and helps homeowners and businesses avoid the nightmare of clogged gutters.

 Who’s Flowmate For?
 Homeowners – Reduce the need for frequent gutter cleaning and prevent water damage.
 Roofers & Gutter Installers – Offer your clients a game-changing upsell that protects their investment.
 Gutter Cleaners – Boost your business by providing long-term solutions for your customers.
 Wholesalers & Distributors – Flowmate is in high demand, and we’re expanding fast!

 Growth & Expansion
The response to Flowmate has been phenomenal. Industry professionals are already making the switch, and demand is growing nationwide. We’ve built strong partnerships with roofers, gutter cleaners, and wholesalers, and we’re always looking for more like-minded businesses to join us.

DACUS este cel mai mare magazin de bricolaj, materiale de construcție și grădinărit înființat în anul 2020 în localitatea Buchin de lângă Caransebeș. 

Misiunea DACUS este de a ajuta clienții să-și ducă la îndeplinire fiecare proiect la care visează. Astfel, am căutat să oferim produse care nu se găsesc în altă parte și care satisfac cele mai exigente standarde de calitate pe care le oferim la un preț corect.

Avem o gamă largă de produse care însumează un total de peste 25.000 articole de la branduri renumite precum: Lahti Pro, Proline, Tryton, Mega, Teesa, Grohe, Geberit, Ferro, Cersanit, Ceresit, Sika, Knauf, Bel Profile, Kruger & Matz, Tesa, Kober, Policolor, Savana, Ruris, Agro CS, Agrosel, etc.

În magazinul DACUS, clienții noștri pot găsi echipamente de protecție, electronice, electrocasnice, articole de grădină, materiale de construcții, sanitare, unelte, mobilier, materiale pentru amenajări interioare, decorațiuni, electrice și tot ce este necesar pentru realizarea proiectului de construcție sau reamenajare.

Nevoile clienților sunt prioritățile noastre de bază. Astfel ne străduim să satisfacem nevoile acestora în cel mai atent mod, dovedind prin acțiunile noastre profesionalism, transparență și dedicare.

DACUS este alegerea corectă oferind un preț corect și oferte reale pentru a fi siguri că suntem un partenerul de încredere pentru orice proiect de construcție sau renovare.
DACUS – DE PESTE UN AN ALĂTURI DE TINE CU PREȚURI CORECTE

Name: The Woodpicker Knows
Description:
The Woodpicker Knows is a consumer-education campaign backed by research from The Blake Project. Its purpose is simple and urgent: counter misleading marketing, reduce category confusion, and restore the perceived value of real hardwood flooring.

The campaign does three essential things:

1. Establishes Clear Reference Points
The Woodpicker Knows gives consumers objective benchmarks—cost of ownership, durability, moisture resistance, maintenance requirements, and environmental impact. It removes marketing spin and repositions hardwood as the category’s gold standard.

2. Creates an Uncompromising Authority
Inspired by the natural world, The Woodpicker is more than a mascot. It is a trusted, unwavering advocate for real wood—calling out man-made substitutes and refusing to blur the line between authentic materials and imitations.

3. Recognizes Industry Leaders
The campaign highlights Best-in-Class brands, retailers, distributors, and manufacturers who meet higher standards of transparency, quality, and education—helping consumers make smarter, more confident flooring decisions.

As we know, imitators have an advantage due to years of misleading yet convincing messaging. Now, they are meeting their match in an educated consumer and a trusted industry voice.

Join The Woodpicker. Join The Movement.

Name: VersiCell Bulgaria
Description:
VersiCell is a lightweight modular drainage block with high durability, primarily designed for subsurface drainage and creating reservoirs for underground infiltration or rainwater storage.

When installed between roofing and pavers or ballast, VersiCell drainage blocks reduce sound transmission and improve thermal insulation.
VersiCell is designed to withstand the stresses caused by mechanical equipment such as Bob Cat and others.

Available in 30 mm high modules, the VersiCell 3050 modules snap into the same plane, at right angles to each other, or can be joined together.
The plant in Singapore was one of the pioneers among the suppliers of drainage blocks. With our experience as a supplier and manufacturer of drainage blocks, our users can be assured of the quality and durability of VersiCell.

Manufactured from high-strength polypropylene, VersiCell is used in the construction of roof gardens, parking lots, basements, pond filtration systems, concealed drains, pre-cast and site-built drainage systems and sports fields.

Name: Pickett Building Materials
Description:
In business since 1982, Pickett Building Materials has much to offer any contractor.
We are the largest masonry supplier in the area.  With our sister company, Oneonta Block Co. sited in the same location, we are at an advantage when it comes to supplying masonry products and accessories.

A fleet consisting of boom trucks, straight trucks dump and box trucks, as well as tractor / trailer and tag-along forklifts make full-service deliveries available.
Our affiliation with Otsego Ready Mix, Inc. rounds out our 'Full Service' adage.Otsego Ready Mix has a fleet of mixers which consist of Front Discharge, Rear Discharge and 3 yard mixer.  There are also 2 pumps: a 41 meter 5 stage Z-Boom and a 30 meter 3 stage boom.

In addition to the over 100+ years of combined experience offered by salespeople in our retail store, a Certified Building Materials Specialist is on staff to assist Contractors with any questions or special needs that arise.

As well as the full-range of hand and power tools in stock, special orders can also be placed.  
Over 2,000 square feet of landscape items are on display along with doors & windows! 

Two insulation blowing machines are available for rent.

Pickett's prides itself on the quality and name brands offered in the products we sell.  Special orders are our forte.

We've been around for over a quarter century, and we'll be around for a long time to come as we pride ourselves in establishing partnerships with our customers, who are not just numbers, but are an integral cog in the mechanism of success.  When everyone works together, success will follow.

Name: VEGRU

The company was founded with the goal of launching a modular metal garden bed system with a 20+ year life expectancy, utilizing eco-friendly metal materials instead of cutting down trees. We emphasize innovative design and high quality with our products. The name VEGRU carries the spirit of DIY modular raised beds suitable for growing vegetables. 
VEGRU gained great popularity right after its launch and is now the leading brand in raised garden beds. Raised garden beds have become popular amongst both novice and experienced gardeners alike due to their functionality and form. Our raised garden beds help you utilize the space you have available efficiently, providing a fulfilling experience for every gardener. 
Besides the standard kits, VEGRU also provides extension kits with individual panels for customers to uniquely customize their garden space. Because of the affordable pricing and longevity, VEGRU is the most cost-efficient way to build DIY garden beds. 
Every piece of raised bed sold by VEGRU is backed by the corporate belief in making sure our goods can last at least 20 years. Unbeaten by the daily harshness of rain or shine.
Because of the affordable pricing and incredible durability, look no further for the most cost-efficient way to build DIY garden beds. 
Choose Quality, Choose VEGRU.

Name: Porcelain Tiles Ltd
Description:
Italian porcelain slabs represent a new generation of high-performance surface materials. New styles for interior designers and architects including stone, marble and concrete effect porcelain slabs. Visit our London Showrooms.

Working alongside architects, interior designers, commercial and residential developers, we are driven by a pride in our collection and an appetite for delivering effective design.

From architectural structures to custom-made furniture, contemporary landscapes to luxurious interiors, Italian porcelain is now at the heart of each concept, shaping the space around us and bringing ideas to life.

Our professional consultants enjoy a close partnership with our Italian manufacturers they have regular communication with some of the UK’s most celebrated architects and designers.

This allows us to offer a collection that is not only unrivalled in the tile sector, but also reflects the change in how we think about surface covering.

Our products have been specified in over a thousand projects worldwide, including some of London’s most prestigious homes, and we are proud of the reputation we have earned within the architectural design sector.

Providing our clients with a knowledgeable service and a superior product ensures that each and every project, whether it be a new development, contemporary office space or luxury hotel, has the opportunity to realise its potential to enhance the lifestyle of its occupants.

Through our Now Imagine campaign we hope to inspire designers to think of each porcelain slab as a creative surface. We offer support and flexibility for those with an innovative approach to surface design, to help them unlock the full potential of large format porcelain slabs.

With space and time to experience the finest materials, our showrooms have been conceived to inspire and inform.

Name: CDC Torriani
Description:
La nostra storia inizia nel 1984 quando Claudio Torriani, proveniente da una famiglia di agricoltori, decide di dedicarsi sempre più alla riparazione e alla vendita di prodotti e attrezzature per agricoltura e giardinaggio.

Lasciando quindi l'attività di famiglia a Buscate, decide di intraprendere una propria strada accompagnato dai suoi figli, Cristian e David.

Nel 2009 ci trasferiamo a Gallarate dove, sebbene gli spazi siano limitati, non lo è l'entusiasmo con cui offriamo i nostri servizi ad una clientela che ci sceglie per professionalità e competenza. 

Nel 2017 decidiamo di fare il salto di qualità spostandoci nella odierna, spaziosa sede di Busto Arsizio in Corso Sempione 240 e conseguentemente, per offrire un servizio ancora più efficiente, ampliamo gradatamente lo staff, portando il nostro team da 6 a 14 persone, esperte e costantemente aggiornate.

La crescita del negozio è repentina e ci permette di elevare ulteriormente il servizio di assistenza alla clientela, specializzandoci in sempre più settori ed espandendo il nostro bacino di utenza, sia privata che professionale, permettendoci di affermarci come solido 

punto di riferimento del Nord Est della Lombardia per tutti gli appassionati e i professionisti del verde.

Name: Yard and Garden Guru
Description:
Welcome to Yard and Garden Guru! 

Are you passionate about nurturing a lush, thriving garden or designing an exquisite outdoor living space? Yard and Garden Guru is your ultimate destination for everything related to yards, gardens, and outdoor living. Our mission is to inspire, educate, and empower garden enthusiasts and outdoor lovers, transforming the ordinary into the extraordinary.

As a community of like-minded green thumbs and fresh-air aficionados, we at Yard and Garden Guru believe that a vibrant and flourishing outdoor space can significantly enhance your quality of life. Our team of experienced gardeners, horticulturists, and landscape designers are dedicated to bringing you the latest trends, practical tips, and expert advice. We cover a wide range of topics, including:

 Gardening: From beginners to seasoned gardeners, learn the best practices, creative ideas, and eco-friendly techniques for growing a healthy and abundant garden.

 Landscaping: Discover the secrets to stunning landscape designs, sustainable practices, and innovative ideas that will transform your outdoor space into a personal oasis.

 Outdoor Living: Make the most of your outdoor space with inspiring ideas for outdoor furniture, lighting, and décor, while exploring ways to maximize comfort, functionality, and style.

 DIY Projects: Unleash your creativity with step-by-step guides on DIY projects, ranging from building garden beds to crafting unique outdoor decorations.

 Sustainability: Learn how to create an eco-conscious yard and garden, focusing on water conservation, composting, and organic practices that benefit the environment.

By joining the Yard and Garden Guru community on LinkedIn, you'll stay connected with fellow enthusiasts, gain access to exclusive content, and be the first to know about our latest articles, videos, and resources. So, whether you're a novice gardener taking your first steps, a seasoned pro looking for fresh inspiration, or a nature lover

We are not a fancy dealership and we deliver as much value as possible.

As our business grew so did our manufacturer relationships.  In addition to our 15,000 SQ FT store,  we occupy 200,000 SQ FT outside of Charlotte, NC where we receive, process and repair returns from many major manufacturers.  And, we are still growing. We do our own paint and metal work, use only original manufacturer parts, and custom crate each machine to survive the roughest of journeys.

At SJM Marketplace Ventures, we take pride in everything we produce. Although our industry has changed immensely over time, there are some things that remain constant such as our attention to detail, the quality of our goods and our care for those who use our products

Description:
The pPod is the perfect micro-greenhouse for growing a wide variety of herbs and vegetables in any location, especially where plants can be damaged by wind, storms, pests, or freezing.

The pPod, mini-greenhouse is perfect for balcony gardens, decks, roof gardens, and areas where plants need to be protected from high winds, pests, and wildlife.

This all-plastic insulating design is rugged and versatile with two flexible sliding access panels that also serve to control temperature and air flow.

A single pPod has a 24" x 24" base and is 32" inches tall.

Attach 1 or more pPod Expanders to your pPod.

An Expander has the same 24"x24" base as the pPod. Side-by-side, with no walls between each segment, Expanders are used to economically create a larger pPod enclosure.

There is no limit to the number of Expanders that can be added on to your pPod.

Material:  Panels: twin-wall polycarbonate  Frame: PVC   Base: polyethylene sheet/twin wall 

All parts of a pPod are fully recyclable.

pPods are assembled easily in minutes. Disassembly is just as easy, making pPods portable and easy to store.

Heat mats and grow lights are available to keep your plants safe and warm all-year-round!

pPods are made entirely in the U.S. by a small start-up company.
Currently only available in the U.S.

Name: Genbrugs Gulvfilt
Description:
Genbrugs Gulvfilt er direkte genbrug af brugte tæpper fra de store danske messer, og fungerer perfekt til at afdække gulve i byggeriet, både i nybyggeri og renovering. 
Tæpperne har tidligere været brugt som helt almindelige gulvtæpper på store udstillinger og stande. De har typisk været brugt én gang.
I Danmark anvender vi messetæpper svarende til et areal på størrelse med Fyn. 
Hvert år. 
Hos Genbrugs Gulvfilt sorterer, rengør og tilpasser vi tæpperne, så de kan genbruges i stedet for at blive smidt ud. 
Det er 1:1 Direkte Genbrug. 
Når du bruger materialer der er Direkte Genbrug, tæller det med 0 kg i dit klimaregnskab.
Byggepladsen, og altså de materialer, du anvender under byggeriet, tæller med i dit samlede klimaregnskab.

Genbrugs Gulvfilt koster det samme som nyproduceret gulvpap. 
Og derudover giver filttæpperne mange arbejdsmæssige fordele, såsom stødabsorberende, akustiske fordele, nemt at tilpasse og rives ikke let i stykker.

De fleste messetæpper består af ren PP (polypropylen) som er en termoplast. Og de fleste tæpper kan faktisk genanvendes ved omsmeltning.
Det er dog de færreste, der vælger at sende deres brugte tæpper til genanvendelse, da det kræver fragt til Belgium med tilhørende håndtering og udgifter.
Derfor bortskaffe størstedelen af brugte messetæpper som småt brændbart.

Genbrugs Gulvfilt samarbejder  med den danske messe -og udstillingsindustri. Vores produktion af Genbrugs Gulvfilt er sat op i Holstebro, i samarbejde med Slagteriet og Loop Hub.
Det er vores mål er at reducere affald og udledning, og samtidig tilbyde et produkt der giver værdi, både på kvalitet, pris og klima. 
Vi kan kun være cirkulære sammen.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Name: Traktor Export

Traktor Export 
Nachhaltigkeit bewegt Maschinen.

Traktor Export ist die Lösung für Unternehmen, die nachhaltig handeln und gleichzeitig wirtschaftlich denken.
Wir sind spezialisiert auf den bundesweiten Ankauf, die Aufbereitung und den Export von gebrauchten und defekten Rasentraktoren und Kommunaltraktoren.

 Unser Ansatz:
Anstatt Maschinen zu entsorgen, schaffen wir neue Werte durch Wiederverwendung, Instandsetzung und gezielte Vermarktung.
So entsteht ein nachhaltiger Kreislauf, der Ressourcen spart, CO₂ reduziert und für Unternehmen messbare wirtschaftliche Vorteile bringt.

 Unsere Stärken:

Bundesweite Lösungen für Unternehmen & Märkte

Nachhaltige Aufbereitung und Wiederverwendung von Maschinen

Umsatzsteigernde Kampagnen wie „Alt gegen Neu“, die ökologische Verantwortung mit Absatzförderung verbinden

Verlässliche Exportstrukturen und Partnernetzwerke in ganz Europa

Wir bieten Unternehmen die Möglichkeit, Nachhaltigkeit als echten Wettbewerbsvorteil zu nutzen, durch clevere Konzepte, transparente Prozesse und partnerschaftliche Zusammenarbeit.

Name: BucketCo.
Description:
The 5 Gallon Bucket has been silenced, under utilized and under represented—and BucketCo. is here to change that. We stand to unlock the bucket’s potential to speak, perform and exist beyond all expectations.

We transform buckets from ordinary objects to pop culture icons by capturing the imaginations of bucket users. Through fun, lifestyle-inspired graphics, rich story telling and laughable content, we breathe new life into the bucket—elevating it from boorishly bland vessel to highly versatile and deeply expressive, lifestyle necessity . 

From limited application to infinite utility, we demonstrate just how versatile and endlessly helpful buckets can be through humorous and relentlessly creative brand content designed to illuminate and inspire a whole new world of usability . 

From irresponsibly disposable to emotionally indispensable, we discourage wastefulness and cause people to rethink bucket lifespans. We transform buckets from single use plastic disposables bound for the landfill to indispensable items of affinity and attachment—encouraging reuse and collectability.

From rigid and awkward to advanced ergonomic durability, we use softer, more pliable plastics in our manufacturing process making our buckets more versatile and comfortable to use and our “mould in” design technology allows for our vibrant graphics too resist chemicals, abrasion, UV light, heat, moisture and more—making each bucket a masterpiece of color that won’t fade, scratch, warp or fade.  

From the back of every garage to every corner of the world, we’re allowing more people to use more buckets more easily and in more ways than ever before. This isn't just about changing the bucket, it's about changing lives—and that’s why we're here.
Primary Industry: Retail Building Materials and Garden Equipment

Bij alles wat Holsto Tuinen doet wordt de minst verspillende optie gezocht: potjes en traytjes worden retour genomen, bestrating wordt hergebruikt, gif gebruiken we al sinds 2012 niet meer, etiketten worden hergebruikt, op grote boompotten zit statiegeld, alle interieur is tweedehands, etc.

Sinds september 2015 zijn we tevens importeur en dealer van het Zwitserse Eternit; met hele mooie en handgemaakte tuinpotten en tuinmeubilair. Deze potten gaan een leven lang mee en worden met de jaren alleen maar mooier.

Name: MACA Stone
Description:
Organic natural stone is a valuable resource that is both durable and long-lasting. However, traditional stone processing methods have not evolved much over the years, resulting in outdated and inefficient techniques. At MACA, we have revolutionized the industry by developing a patented technology that allows us to extract ultra-light and ultra-thin slabs of some of the world's most stunning natural stones in an eco-friendly and sustainable way.

Our MACA natural stone slabs are state-of-the-art in both weight and appearance, with the natural finish and texture of the organic stone preserved. Despite being only 1.5mm-4mm thick, our product boasts the same durability and aesthetic appeal as traditional slabs, without their excess weight and environmental waste. Additionally, our translucent collection can transmit light, giving the stone a naturally warmer appearance, making it perfect for both residential and commercial use.

Name: ToolBack
Description:
Met ToolBack redden we kapot gereedschap van de afvalcontainer. In Nederland worden elk jaar zo’n 8 miljoen tools weggegooid. Waardevolle metalen, accu’s en onderdelen verdwijnen in de restafvalstroom, terwijl veel gereedschap prima gerepareerd of refurbished kan worden.

Met ToolBack creëren we refurbished gereedschap voor elke klus.

Hoe het werkt?
We plaatsen gratis een ToolBack-inzamelbak bij bedrijven.
Medewerkers gooien er simpelweg alles in wat stuk is. Wij doen de rest:

• ophalen en sorteren
• repareren en refurbishen
• recyclen wat niet te redden is
• inzicht en impactcijfers terugkoppelen

Zelfde gedrag. Grotere impact. Geen extra werk.

We draaien nu een pilot met 10 locaties.
Tijdens de pilot onderzoeken we onder andere:

• type en volume gereedschap
• repareerbaarheidspercentage
• CO₂- en materiaalbesparing
• opbrengsten refurbished tools

En vooral: hoe we samen een circulair gereedschapsmodel kunnen opschalen.

Ons doel: in 2030 de grootste refurbished gereedschapswinkel van Europa.

Wil jouw organisatie meedoen of meer weten?
Stuur ons een bericht of kijk op www.toolback.nl

Name: Grow my Green
Description:
We're here to MAKE GROWING SIMPLE.

Why? Because people should explore for themselves in a concious way how the world's most powerful plant can help them to maximize their generative drive and find their potential; whether that's through midfulness, trauma healing, sleeping better, or just smiling more. And something that powerful should be as easy as a houseplant.

We've realized that the usual growing techniques remain over-optimized, complex, and expensive - or in other words: a niche hobby for a few selected individuals.

We're here to change that. 

To make growing the best herb accessible to the broad public, we want to simplify the game, make those wallets happier, prioritize environmental impact and enable all existing or future hobby gardeners.

We want to achieve this by offering:
 1. An All-in-One Grow Kit that only contains the few must-needs to grow – easy to use, affordable, sustainable and usable without a grow box
 2. A tailored guide that covers the few critical steps to grow a plant from seed to smile – easy to follow pictures, without any upfront learning

Because we believe that’s everything you need for a successful and fun grow.

The fundamental beliefs that set us apart:
 - Simplicity sparks confidence: We're all about making things easy, giving every curious soul a confidence boost to grow their own herb – remember, it's called a weed for a reason
 - Affordability for all: Growing like a pro doesn't mean emptying your wallet. We're focusing on the essentials for wallet-friendly results
 - Sustainability equals quality: By cutting all the fluff, we keep our approach eco-conscious – this will not only make our planet happy, but also ensures pure & organic results
 - Empowerment fuels success: We're here to hand you everything to rock your own grow – no Googling involved
 - Joy in growing: Growing should be a dance, not a march – let's have fun along the journey

Name: The Crop Candle Company T/A Eco Fuego
Description:
The inception of The Crop Candle Company Ltd marked the genesis of Frost Protection Candles tailored specifically for the UK Vineyard industry. In 2020, the market exclusively featured paraffin candles. This prompted us to take a pioneering step by becoming sponsors of SWGB (Sustainable Wines of Great Britain), standing shoulder to shoulder with esteemed names like Marks and Spencer’s and Waitrose. Our mission was clear: develop a candle that minimized CO2 emissions, prioritized eco-friendliness for vineyards, and maintained the high standards of burn time and heat output.

Our relentless pursuit led us to a ground-breaking formula that not only extended burn times but also harnessed the power of 100% vegetable wax. Today, we proudly supply the majority of UK Vineyards, including notable names like Nytimber, Roebuck, and Simpsons, with a sustainable solution to safeguard their crops from spring frosts.

Our candles, generating substantial heat, inspired us to create the Eco Fuego Fire Pit. Introduced at the SOLEX exhibition in July, it garnered the prestigious Award for Best Individual Product. The Eco Fuego fire pit range is unrivalled in efficiency and effectiveness, emitting a staggering 90% less carbon per hour compared to conventional fire pits. It stands as the epitome of eco-friendliness in the realm of fire pits.

The Eco Fuego refill is a marvel, burning for hours with a consistently mesmerizing and therapeutic flame. It requires no constant tending, unlike other fire pits, and leaves behind no wood smoke, ash, or embers. Its portability makes it the preferred choice for small gardens, picnics, camping, and various outdoor activities, providing ample heat for the intended audience.

Designed with natural wood, the Eco Fuego fire pit complements its 100% sustainably sourced natural fuel, emitting practically no smoke. If you seek to escape the smoke and bonfire scent that often lingers, the Eco Fuego is your new flame of choice.

Transform your outdoor space with our affordable, high-quality products. Your backyard should be an oasis to unwind and relax after a long day. But relaxing is hard when your backyard is unorganized. We’re here to help! 

Whether you need a shed to store your lawnmower, a playset for your children to exercise on, some poly outdoor furniture for relaxing; or a garage, pavilion, gazebo, or a house for your pet, we have something for you, whether custom order or in stock. 

Find the ultimate backyard solution from our large inventory of sheds, garages, pavilions, pergolas, and gazebos. With a variety of options to choose from, you can easily find the perfect fit for your needs and enhance your outdoor living area.

Let your children's imaginations soar as they explore our wide variety of swing sets, playhouses, and playground equipment. Experience the superior craftsmanship of these playsets, built by skilled Amish craftsmen in the heart of Lancaster County, PA.

Enhance your outdoor living area with durable and stylish poly outdoor chairs, swings, benches, table sets, and rockers & gliders. These products are designed to withstand the elements and provide years of comfort and relaxation.

Create a safe and secure backyard environment with high-quality fencing, railing, and decking options that not only add aesthetic appeal but also offer privacy and protection. Whether you’re searching for vinyl, aluminum, or chain-link fencing, we have a solution for you.

At Myerstown Sheds and Fencing, we've been helping homeowners, contractors, and other organizations create beautiful and functional outdoor spaces for over 35 years. From custom-built sheds and garages to playsets, fencing, pergolas, gazebos, and outdoor furniture, we offer everything you need to make your backyard dreams a reality. We also stock a large inventory of building products such as decking, railing, trim boards, and more for our valued home builders.

Name: Engroove • Sliding Barn Door Hardware
Description:
Engroove’s hardware utilizes a universal mounting system to fit wood, glass, or metal doors. Our unique wood tracks are available in a variety of woods, with reclaimed, and urban salvage options. We partner with local suppliers, Edensaw Woods Ltd, Pacific Northwest Timbers, and Wayland Constructive, to provide you with a broad variety of carefully selected gorgeous options for your wood track.

We currently offer six bracket systems with both top and face mounting options. Our brackets are manufactured from either 1018 or Stainless Steel, and come in Brushed Stainless or Matte Black finishes - manufactured on the Olympic Peninsula in Washington state. Engroove systems use aluminum-hubbed polyurethane wheels, or v-groove cast iron wheels + a stainless guide for low noise, and smooth movements.

Engroove has been manufacturing and installing products in Port Townsend, Washington, for ten years. We have over one hundred systems installed with zero complaints and 100% positive feedback. We believe in our products, and back each one with a lifetime warranty. 
Bulk discounts are available.

Name: Kohubath
Description:
Our bricks provide optimal growing conditions for plants, helping them thrive.

100% Natural 
Derived from the tree peel of Cocos nucifera, coconut fiber serves as a substrate—a 100% natural and organic material. With its sustainable origin, it offers an eco-friendly option for various applications, from gardening to erosion control, showcasing its versatility and commitment to a greener environment.

Ph Balanced 
Coconut Coir brings harmony to gardening and horticulture. Our eco-friendly coconut coir provides the perfect balance of water retention and aeration for thriving plants. Cultivate a greener world with our natural and sustainable substrate, making gardening an enriching experience for both you and the environment. (PH: 5.8-6.8)

ECO Friendly 
Kohubath, an eco-friendly alternative, originates from the fibrous husk of coconuts. With its sustainable sourcing and biodegradability, it promotes responsible cultivation. By reducing waste and conserving resources, coconut coir plays a pivotal role in supporting a greener and more environmentally conscious world.

Bio Degradable 
Kohubath is a natural and biodegradable material, derived from coconut husks. Its organic composition allows it to break down naturally over time, returning to the earth without leaving harmful pollutants behind. Choosing coconut coir promotes environmental responsibility and contributes to a cleaner, greener world.

Name: Houtt
Description:
Bij Houtt zijn we van mening dat een tuin een sfeervolle, rustgevende en bovenal gezellige plek moet zijn.

Een plek waar je heerlijk met vrienden en familie geniet van het buitenleven. De moderne tuin biedt alle ruimte, rust en gezelligheid die je je maar wenst. Denk aan tuinideeën in de vorm van overkappingen, of een trendy hout-beton schutting waar momenteel veel vraag naar is. Ook de houten vlonder en sfeervolle schuttingen zijn van toegevoegde waarde voor iedere tuin. Zo geniet je het hele jaar door van dit verlengstuk van jouw woning.

Wij proberen net dat stapje extra te zetten om iedereen de ultieme droomtuin te kunnen bezorgen. Het is onze wens dat je een tuin creëert waar je nog vele jaren veel plezier van gaat hebben. Een tuin waar je dag in dag uit een glimlach van op het gezicht krijgt. Wij zijn van mening dat we hierin kunnen voorzien door:
-> Hoge kwaliteit en budgetvriendelijke producten
-> Deskundig advies van professionals voor tuin inspiratie
-> Onze extra service 'levering-in-de-tuin'
-> Bijdrage aan maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen

Wij helpen je graag bij je zoektocht naar de ultieme droomtuin. Wil je tuinideeën voor jouw eigen tuin opdoen en daarbij de juiste ondersteuning van een expert krijgen? Maak dan nu een afspraak met een van onze specialisten. Loop samen video bellend door de tuin om ideeën te bespreken, opties te creëren en plannen te verwezenlijken. Samen zorgen we ervoor dat jouw tuin er precies uit gaat zien zoals je in gedachten hebt.

Heb je besteld? Dan gaan wij aan de slag om jouw bestelling zo snel mogelijk te leveren. Aangezien wij dit in heel Nederland en West Vlaanderen doen, is Houtt voor iedereen toegankelijk. Wil je jouw bestelling veilig opgeslagen hebben op eigen terrein? Maak dan gebruik van onze Tuinlevering service. Vele handen maken licht werk!

Veel tuinplezier,

Team Houtt

Sie finden auch alte Kachelöfen aus unserer Region, Parkettböden oder profilierte Holzdecken. Wir haben sehr schöne Türen und Tore aus verschiedenen Jahrhunderten am Lager, Zimmertüren aus Nuss- oder Kirschbaumholz in verschiedenen Grössen, aber auch Haustüren aus Eichenholz. Für den Aussen- wie den Innenbereich können wir Ihnen eine breite Auswahl von Bodenmaterialien anbieten: Holz, Ton- und Sandsteinplatten, ja sogar Pflastersteine, runde und eckige. Alte Beetbegrenzungen für den Garten finden Sie ebenso wie steinerne Brunnentröge. Name: Upaaj
Description:
At Upaaj, we focus to make it easy and affordable for everyone to bring the beauty of nature into their homes and workspaces. We are passionate about plants and believe they have the power to transform any space into the hub of positivity.  

We offer a wide variety of high-quality houseplants, succulents, air plants, and more. What sets us apart is our commitment to providing personalized customer service and sharing our plant expertise.  

Our team of plant enthusiasts is dedicated to helping our customers select the perfect plants for their needs and lifestyles. Whether you're a seasoned plant parent or a total beginner, we'll guide you through the process of choosing, caring for, and enjoying your new leafy companions. From low-maintenance succulents to lush, trailing vines, we have something for every space and skill level.  

You can browse our selection, speak with our knowledgeable staff, and can follow our social media platforms to choose your best green buddy. Our greenhouse-inspired catalog is a plant lover's paradise, filled with vibrant greenery, unique planters, and all the accessories you need to create your own indoor oasis.  

At Upaaj, we believe that plants are not just decor - they're living, breathing organisms that can improve your mood, purify the air, and bring a sense of calm to any space. That's why we source our plants from trusted, sustainable growers and use eco-friendly packaging and shipping methods. We're committed to promoting plant-based wellness and reducing our environmental impact.  

Our plant selection is carefully curated to ensure the highest quality and long-term health of each plant. From easy-to-care-for pothos and ZZ plants to more exotic options like fiddle-leaf figs and monstera deliciosa, we've got a wide variety of species to choose from. And if you're not sure where to start, our plant care tips and personalized recommendations can help you find the perfect match.

Voor FC-i is de 2050 klimaatdoelstelling nu al mogelijk!

FC-i slaat CO2 op (emissie negatief) en daarmee heeft het positieve bijdrage aan de emissie uitstoot. De Carbon Credits die zo ontstaan worden verhandeld en gedeeld met de keten (leveranciers en afnemers).

Name: RONA Quincaillerie Notre-Dame St-Henri
Description:
Fondée en 1889 par Georges Lanouette, la Quincaillerie Notre-Dame a toujours œuvré dans St-Henri, la « Petite-Bourgogne ». Depuis lors, elle a évolué en une entreprise familiale exploitée par ses deux petits-fils, Jean et Marc, ainsi que par leur père, Georges.

Jadis un petit commerce de quartier, cette entreprise, dont la surface s’étend maintenant sur 20 000 pieds carrés, continue de se distinguer par son service courtois et personnalisé. Les besoins sans cesse croissant des clients ont amené les Lanouette à élargir considérablement leur base de services et de produits en plus de créer une section commerciale et industrielle pour mieux satisfaire les besoins des entreprises.
La division Industrium de la Quincaillerie Notre-Dame représente un atout majeur. Elle commercialise des produits exclusifs ainsi qu’une gamme impressionnante de fournitures destinées à cette tranche particulière de notre clientèle.

Les Lanouette sont heureux de compter parmi les fournisseurs les mieux cotés parmi ses clients. C’est la raison pour laquelle, en 1994, ils ont acquis le « Centre de rénovation Magnan ». Oeuvrant aujourd’hui sous le nom de Centre de rénovation St-Patrick, ce commerce commercialise une gamme étendue de fournitures et de matériaux de construction.
La multitude de matériaux de construction que l’on y retrouve demeure une valeur sûre pour cet établissement doté d’une vaste cour à bois de 60 000 pieds carrés dont les installations se trouvent à la fois à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur. De plus, un service de livraison rapide compte parmi les nombreux avantages dont bénéficient les clients.

La Quincaillerie Notre-Dame et le Centre de Rénovation St-Patrick forment une entité unique. La nature complémentaire de ces deux commerces assure aux clients choix, variété et qualité. Par-dessus tout, elle inspire confiance et loyauté.

Name: GravaPro SV
Description:
Paneles estabilizadores de grava en El Salvador: Diseño, ingeniería y sostenibilidad - Sistema GravaPro 

Somos la empresa pionera en El Salvador que redefine la construcción de pavimentos exteriores. Proporcionamos paneles estabilizadores de grava 100% permeables, una solución de ingeniería de alto rendimiento para proyectos residenciales, comerciales e infraestructura pública.

                               ¿Por qué elegir nuestro sistema?

1.  Máxima Estabilidad y Resistencia a Carga: Nuestras celdas hexagonales de alta densidad garantizan una distribución eficaz de la carga, permitiendo que la superficie soporte el tránsito de vehículos ligeros, pesados e incluso camiones de emergencia. Olvídese de surcos y desplazamientos de grava, manteniendo un acabado limpio y uniforme.

2.  Gestión de Aguas Pluviales (SuDS): Con una permeabilidad cercana al 100%, contribuimos activamente a la Gestión Urbana Sostenible del Agua (SuDS). El sistema facilita la infiltración total del agua de lluvia al subsuelo, reduciendo drásticamente la escorrentía superficial y el riesgo de inundaciones en estacionamientos, plazas y aceras.

3.  Sostenibilidad Ambiental: Nuestro producto está fabricado con material 100% reciclable, ofreciendo una alternativa ecológica y duradera al pavimento tradicional.

4.  Ahorro y Eficiencia:
- Fácil y Rápida Instalación: Su diseño modular y sistema de unión 'click' permite un montaje sencillo y rápido, reduciendo los tiempos y costos de obra.
- Bajo Mantenimiento:La estructura previene la mezcla de la grava con el sub

Name: MD Brick
Description:
Like all successful businesses MD Brick started with very small team, an idea and a garage.

Founder, Martin Driene, worked in the building industry with Austral Bricks (a  leading brick manufacturer in Australia) for over 12 years and was passionate about the industry.

He recognised a gap in the market when it came to offering a more personalised service to small to medium (SMB) sized trades and consumers. The big companies were being looked after, however, the up-and-coming tradies were finding it hard to compete for the same level of service, price and product range.

As an expert in the industry, Martin embarked on his journey to service this gap, and in 2006 MD Brick was born. Working from the garage in his Central Coast home, Martin began building his clientele of SMBs needing bricks and other masonry products, offering a personalised service that matched what the larger companies were receiving from the leading brands. 

Turns out this was a winning formula. It wasn't too long before the business outgrew the garage, has since outgrown 4 premises, and now employs 18 staff across two locations, West Gosford and Minchinbury. 

Not only has the business grown, but the variety of products has also grown. Initially only distributing bricks and masonry products and then moved into more diverse landscaping products. These included exquisite natural stone, clay and concrete pavers, stone cladding, coloured blocks and retaining wall blocks.

Not being content to rest on its success MD Brick continued to evolve. While still maintaining a steady focus on servicing SMBs, MD now stocks and supplies a range of boutique bricks, blocks, pavers and fibre cement cladding to service projects for architects, landscape designers and interior designers. 

If you’re looking for expert advice, boutique or sustainable products and premium service, connect with us on LinkedIn or email us at  sales@mdbrick.com.au

Name: greenroof.hu
Description:
A  greenroof Hungary csapatát lelkes tájépítész tervezők, zöldtető álmodók, szakkivitelezők, szigetelő szakemberek és természetesen kereskedők alkotják. A mögöttünk álló tudás és referenciák predesztináltak minket arra, hogy meg tudtunk állapodni az összes hazai-, és külföldi zöldtető-építési termékgyártóval. Nincs még egy platform, ahol minden kapcsolódó termék és szolgáltatás elérhető lenne. Szerzőink és tulajdonosi körünk a hazai piac vezető tervezői és kivitelezői közül kerülnek ki. Figyelemmel kísérjük az új trendeket és beszámolunk mindenről amit itthon is bevezethetünk és a zöldtető ágazat fejlődéséhez hozzájárul.

A tervezéstől kezdve támogatást nyújtunk. A tervezőknek letölthető adatbázist biztosítunk díjmentesen a csomópontokról (BIM kompatibilis AutoCad és ArchiCad); a beruházóknak műszaki- és jogértelmezési támogatást nyújtunk, a kivitelezőknek oktatással és műszaki tanácsadással látjuk el, a magánházas érdeklődőknek pedig tervezési kivitelezési segédletet közvetítünk ki az ország legelismertebb szakemberei közül.

Célunk, hogy segítsük és megerősítsük a hazai gyártást: minőségi magyar alapanyagokból, minőségi magyar árut forgalmazó cégek termékeit magyar zászlóval jelöljük. A greenroof.hu kínálatába csak olyan termékeket veszünk fel, amiket mi magunk is nyugodt szívvel beépítenénk – vagy már be is építettünk – saját vagy megbízóink tetőkertjeibe. Csak azokat az anyagokat választjuk ki, amelyek tartós értéket képviselnek a beruházás szempontjából, évek óta kipróbáltak és teszteltek a piacon. Természetesen nem vetjük el az új technológiákat sem, amennyiben ezek bevizsgáltak, megfelelnek az összes építési előírásnak és saját szigorú kritériumainknak

Name: Innowall Poland
Description: Jesteśmy rodzinną firmą, która od 2009 roku zajmuje się produkcją ogrodzeń budowlanych, z wielką pasją i zaangażowaniem. Od samego początku naszej działalności specjalizujemy się w wynajmie ogrodzeń budowlanych, dlatego też wiemy jakie są wymagania i potrzeby klientów, którzy szukają dobrego jakościowo i funkcjonalnego rozwiązania. W naszej ofercie znajdziesz pełne i ażurowe ogrodzenia, a także bariery na imprezy, które pozwolą Ci zabezpieczyć teren budowy lub wydarzenie. Nasza firma oferuje nie tylko wypożyczenie ogrodzeń budowlanych, ale również sprzedaż oraz montaż. Oznacza to, że możesz u nas znaleźć kompleksowe rozwiązania, które spełnią Twoje oczekiwania. Nasze ogrodzenia to gwarancja bezpieczeństwa i trwałości, dzięki czemu możesz mieć pewność, że Twój teren jest odpowiednio zabezpieczony. Postaw na naszą jakość i doświadczenie, dołącz do grona zadowolonych klientów Firmy Innowall Poland. Skontaktuj się z nami już dziś, a nasi specjaliści pomogą Ci dobrać najlepsze rozwiązanie dla Twojego projektu! Proponujemy nowoczesne systemy ogrodzeniowe. Tworzymy je z myślą o deweloperach, przedsiębiorcach oraz osobach prywatnych. Oferujemy ogrodzenia budowlane, ogrodzenia tymczasowe oraz bramy ogrodzenia budowlanego. Naszym celem jest tworzenie produktów funkcjonalnych oraz estetycznych, które spełniają oczekiwane przez klientów standardy. Nasze atuty to staranne wykończenie oraz trwałość i wytrzymałość zastosowanych materiałów. Dysponujemy wykwalifikowaną i niezawodną kadrą pracowniczą. Usługi świadczymy w oparciu o najwyższe standardy techniczne, biznesowe oraz etyczne. Grono Klientów, którzy obdarzyli nas zaufaniem stale wzrasta. Nie spoczywamy na laurach i robimy wszystko, aby ta tendencja nigdy nie uległa zmianie.

Name: Rooted Systems

Builder of vertical garden fence panels equipped with built-in irrigation and solar power for urban microfarming.

Rooted Systems is a North Vancouver-based startup reimagining the backyard as a sustainable food-producing space. Launched in August 2025, we design and install modular vertical garden fence panels with integrated planter boxes, automated drip irrigation, and solar-powered controllers—enabling anyone, even in tight urban spaces, to grow fresh herbs, vegetables, and pollinator-friendly plants right on their fence line.

Our mission is to make small-space gardening effortless, productive, and community-driven. With seasonal planting plans, a neighborhood produce swap program, and app-integrated watering schedules in development, Rooted Systems is building a smarter, greener future—one fence at a time.

Co-founded by Vancouver entrepreneurs Chris Breikss and Rob Miller, Rooted Systems was born out of a shared passion for sustainability, design, and better food access. Chris brings over two decades of growth marketing and e-commerce leadership, while Rob’s background in construction and fabrication ensures each panel is as functional as it is beautiful.

We’re proudly rooted in the Pacific Northwest but growing fast—connecting with early adopters, retailers, and landscapers looking to offer something unique to their clients.

Whether you're a homeowner wanting to grow more of your own food or a designer looking to enhance an outdoor living space, Rooted Systems offers a plug-and-play way to garden smarter, not harder.

Name: Essentials Fix
Description:
EssentialsFix began with a simple vision: to make home improvement and everyday living easier, more accessible, and more inspiring. What started as a small online venture has grown into a trusted destination for thousands of customers across the UK, offering over 26,000+ products that span DIY tools, gardening equipment, cleaning solutions, lifestyle must-haves, and even trending essentials like Stanley cups.

Our journey has been shaped by the belief that everyone deserves the right tools and products to build, repair, and improve their homes and lives. In the early days, we personally packed orders, spoke to every customer, and listened to their challenges. These stories from families transforming their gardens into havens, to young homeowners learning DIY for the first time are at the heart of what drives us today.

But EssentialsFix is more than just an online store. It’s a community built on trust, quality, and innovation. That’s why we’re working to bring even more value to our customers. In the coming years, we plan to:

Open physical stores across key locations in the UK, giving our customers the chance to experience our products in person.

Launch new international brands in DIY, garden, and lifestyle categories, making global quality accessible locally.

Expand our range of everyday essentials to continue meeting the evolving needs of modern households.

Our mission is simple: whether it’s fixing, creating, improving, or simply making daily life a little easier, EssentialsFix will always be here to help you get it done and competitive prices.

Skysen Inc. is a professional fence hardware solutions provider, offering one-stop, high-performance components for global fencing projects. Founded in 2006, we specialize in the R&D, manufacturing, and distribution of fence hardware, door and window hardware, and plastic decorative products. With over 100 employees and 6,000+ square meters of production space, our operations combine strong in-house manufacturing with growing export capabilities.

Since entering the global market in 2012 and establishing our U.S. marketing office in 2018, Skysen has steadily expanded across North America, Europe, Australia, and beyond—achieving over $20 million in annual export sales and 10% yearly growth.

Our core product lines include post connectors, rail/picket hardware, gate system components, decorative accessories, and custom solutions for challenging environments. Skysen products are crafted from premium steel, aluminum alloys, and engineering plastics—designed to meet a variety of structural, aesthetic, and environmental requirements.

From OEM/ODM flexibility to expert technical support and rapid delivery through our U.S. warehouse, we are committed to quality, innovation, and service. Name: DIP Commerce
Description:
Dip Commerce: Vaša adresa za gradnju i opremanje doma

Dobrodošli u Dip Commerce, gdje nudimo sve za gradnju ne samo kuće, već i domova punih ljubavi, topline i udobnosti. Poslujemo preko 30 godina i to na 4 lokacije u Ogulinu, Brinju i Josipdolu. Mi smo vaša lokalna destinacija za sve što vam treba kako biste pretvorili svoje snove o idealnom domu u stvarnost.

Što nas čini posebnim: Naša posebnost je naša prisnost s lokalnom zajednicom, ali i šire. Unatoč našoj udaljenosti od Zagreba, mi smo vaš najbliži partner u gradnji i opremanju doma. Zajedno, putujemo od ideje do stvarnosti, čineći svaki korak u tom procesu nevjerojatno jednostavnim.

Sve na jednom mjestu: U Dip Commerce-u, razumijemo koliko je važno imati sve na jednom mjestu. Ovdje možete pronaći sve, od građevinskih materijala i opreme do udobnog namještaja i dekoracija. Bez obzira jeste li u fazi gradnje, renoviranja ili jednostavno želite osvježiti svoj prostor, mi smo tu za vas.

Savjetujemo i vodimo vas kroz cijeli proces: Naša stručna ekipa i suradnici uvijek su tu kako bi vas vodili kroz cijeli proces. Vaša vizija je naš prioritet, i brinemo da sve bude upravo onako kako ste zamislili. Pružamo personalizirano savjetovanje kako biste donijeli najbolje odluke za svoj dom.

Zadovoljstvo korisnika: Naša najveća nagrada je vaše zadovoljstvo. Ponosimo se brojnim pozitivnim povratnim informacijama koje dobivamo od naših klijenata. Vaša sreća i udobnost su naš cilj.

Izvrsna usluga i povoljne cijene: U Dip Commerce-u, izvrsna usluga ide ruku pod ruku s povoljnim cijenama. Želimo vam pružiti najbolji omjer kvalitete i cijene, jer zaslužujete samo najbolje.

Samo smo sat vremena udaljeni od Zagreba, no isplati se doći. Ovdje ćete pronaći više od trgovine; pronaći ćete dom za svoje snove. Dip Commerce - gdje svaki korak prema vašem savršenom domu postaje topla i osobna avantura. Dobrodošli u našu obitelj, gdje se vaša priča o domu pretvara u stvarnost.

Name: RBD Global Kft. - RAINBALL
Description:
Rainball – a jövő szikkasztórendszere

 Könnyű szállítás – Kompakt kialakításának köszönhetően a Rainball bárhová könnyedén eljuttatható.
 Gyors telepítés – Nincs szükség napokra vagy nagy gépekre: a rendszer percek alatt összeállítható.
 Szaktudás nélkül szerelhető – Bárki össze tudja rakni, így nem kell szakemberre várni.
 Megfizethető ár – Innováció kompromisszumok nélkül – elérhető áron.

A Rainball célja, hogy a csapadékvíz hasznosítása és elvezetése ne legyen többé bonyolult vagy költséges feladat.

Fenntartható, praktikus, modern – készen áll a holnap kihívásaira.

Miért fontos az esővíz szikkasztása?
Az időjárás egyre kiszámíthatatlanabb: hirtelen, intenzív csapadékzáporok váltakoznak hosszú, aszályos időszakokkal. Ilyen körülmények között a megfelelő esővíz-kezelés már nem kényelmi szempont, hanem létfontosságú feltétel a fenntartható környezet és az élhető városi környezet szempontjából.

A szikkasztás lényege, hogy az összegyűlt csapadékvizet nem vezetik el a csatornarendszerbe, hanem visszajuttatják a talajba, lehetővé téve, hogy az ott természetes módon hasznosuljon. 

Ez több szempontból is előnyös:
 Tehermentesíti a csapadékcsatorna-hálózatot, így csökkenti az elöntések, pangó vizek, belvíz kialakulásának kockázatát.
 Helyben tartja a vizet, így az nem vész kárba, hanem a talajban tárolódik, ahol akár a növényzet számára is elérhetővé válik.
 Visszaállítja a természetes vízháztartást, elősegítve a talajvíz utánpótlását, ami különösen fontos a kiszáradó térségekben.
 Környezettudatos megoldás, amely csökkenti az infrastruktúra-építési igényt és a kapcsolódó költségeket.

A jól megtervezett szikkasztórendszerek – mint amilyen a Rainball is – nemcsak hatékonyak, hanem hosszú távon fenntarthatók is, így valódi választ adnak az egyre komolyabb csapadékvíz-kezelési kihívásokra.
A jövő szikkasztása már elérhető. Innovatív rendszerünk már használatban – gyors, biztonságos és fenntartható esővíz-elvezetés lakossági és ipari igényekre.

Name: HTA Baths
Description:
Established in 1999, HTA Products Inc. brings over 25 years of expertise in the bath and kitchen industry. What began as a specialized operation has grown into British Columbia’s largest independent distributor of luxury bath and kitchen fixtures, with three showrooms strategically located across the province. In 2013, HTA expanded its offering by introducing a retail showroom experience tailored to the premium design market. This transition enabled direct access to an exclusive selection of European and North American brands, solidifying HTA’s reputation for quality, service, and design leadership. Today, we support a wide range of clients — including homeowners, interior designers, architects, and builders — with curated product solutions that elevate every space.

Brand Vision
HTA Products Inc. is guided by a clear vision: to redefine the standard of luxury living and become Canada’s most trusted source for premium bath and kitchen design. Our mission is to inspire clients through exceptional products that unite innovation, craftsmanship, and timeless aesthetics.
We believe that every fixture is an opportunity for design expression — a blend of functionality and style that enhances daily living. Our showroom environments are intentionally designed to be immersive and informative, allowing clients to explore, interact, and make confident decisions. Our continued growth is rooted in core values: uncompromising quality, design-forward thinking, and a commitment to excellence at every stage of the client journey.

Partnerships
HTA Products Inc. is a proud partner of the National Kitchen & Bath Association (British Columbia Chapter) and the Luxury Product Group.

Name: دکینگ وود | Deckingwood
Description:
شرکت دکینگ وود از بطن مجموعه اشل سازان هرمس پدید آمده است. این شرکت که سال ۱۳۸۹ پایهگذاری شده، در زمینه معماری منظر و معماری داخلی فعالیت میکند.
دکینگ وود با اتکا به دانش و تجربه متخصصان حوزه چوب پلاست و همکاری با یکی از بزرگترین و باسابقهترین تولیدکنندگان چوب پلاست در ایران، پا به عرصه تولید این محصول بهعنوان متریالی دوستدار محیط زیست نهاده است.
هماکنون این مجموعه با تجهیز کارخانه به جدیدترین دستگاههای وارداتی پیشرفته با استانداردهای روز دنیا، انواع چوب پلاست و درب پلی وود را تولید و روانه بازار میکند.

توانمندیهای دکینگ وود: 
- تولید مستقیم چوب پلاست با بیش از ۴۰ قالب متنوع 
- تولید درب و چارچوب پلی وود با تنوع بسیار در رنگ و CNC
- تولید انواع اکسسوریهای چوب پلاست و ترموود (کفپوش و دیوارپوش، ره پله، میز و نیمکت، آلاچیق، پرگولا، فلاورباکس و …)
- انجام صفر تا صد پروژههای بازسازی بهصورت کاملاً تخصصی
- برخورداری از کارگاه ساخت و تیمهای تخصصی مجرب در زمینه طراحی و اجرای پروژههای چوب پلاستیک و ترموود، نظیر روف گاردن و ...
- طراحى اقلام بهصورت ماژولار و پرتابل بر مبناى استانداردهاى ایالات متحده و تولید با متریالهای بومى مقاوم در برابر عوامل جوی
- سیستم جامع خدمات پس از فروش به مشتریان ارجمند
