Name: Guangzhou Songtao Artificial Tree Co., Ltd.
Description:
Songtao Artificial Tree Co., Ltd. is the leading online source that specializes in artificial trees, artificial plants, artwork, and art decorations.

My journey to crafting these gorgeous, lifelike trees began more humbly. I started as an industrial artist designing arts and crafts in a national enterprise. But I found myself drawn to nature, creating works that could add beauty and boldness on a scale most people never expected.

So in 1997, I set up the Fake Tree Decor craft artificial tree factory and company to realize my dreams. Then, in 1998, we joined with our compatriots from Taiwan who were selling imitation garden products in DongGuan, mainland China, to deliver even more lifelike, stunning works.

With that goal in mind, I led a transformation of your company from the production of decorative handicrafts into simulated horticultural products. Now we’re proud to have one of the world’s leading professional artificial tree companies, and Fake Tree Decor is our main project and we focus each day on improving our designs, production, and sales.

The Process Behind Producing The World’s Best Fake Trees
As we’ve mastered the form, we have been able to produce a larger range of more realistic trees. Our faux trees currently include artificial palm trees, artificial flowering trees, fake olive trees, artificial ficus trees, fake maple trees, tabletop centerpiece trees, and more.

Each tree starts from my analysis of the ecological principles of the simulation tree so that we make sure our designs bring an inspired touch to your space. Through the shape of the tree, the density of its leaves and a careful and reasonable layout, we are able to deliver accurate, standard artificial products.

Throughout the production of our trees, we continue to adhere to this natural ecotype.

The internal structure of the faux tree is welded into a whole by placing a number of steel bars inside the product according to safe and reliable building construction technology.

Description:
Il Garden Le Serre di Chieri è un luogo incantevole situato nella cittadina italiana di Chieri, in provincia di Torino, nel cuore della regione del Piemonte.

Le Serre di Chieri sono un vero e proprio gioiello verde, un'oasi di pace e tranquillità dove i visitatori possono immergersi nella bellezza della natura e nelle sue meraviglie. Il giardino abbraccia una vasta area di terreno e offre una grande varietà di piante e fiori, creando un ambiente unico e suggestivo.

All'interno del giardino, è possibile ammirare diverse serre botaniche, progettate per ospitare piante esotiche e rare provenienti da tutto il mondo. Queste serre sono un vero spettacolo per gli occhi e offrono ai visitatori l'opportunità di scoprire specie vegetali uniche e affascinanti.

Il Giardino Le Serre di Chieri è un luogo ideale per trascorrere del tempo immersi nella natura, godendo della pace e della tranquillità che solo un giardino ben curato può offrire. È il posto perfetto per rilassarsi, passeggiare e lasciarsi ispirare dalla bellezza del mondo vegetale.

Name: Ferretera Rosario
Description:
En Ferretera Rosario, nos enorgullece ser el aliado de profesionales, emprendedores y entusiastas del bricolaje. Nuestra misión es proporcionarte soluciones eficientes y asequibles para tus proyectos.

¿Qué nos distingue?

Presupuestos Rápidos: Entendemos que el tiempo es valioso. Por eso, ofrecemos cotizaciones ágiles para que puedas planificar tus obras sin demoras.
Primeras Marcas: Trabajamos con los fabricantes más reconocidos. Desde herramientas eléctricas hasta materiales de construcción, solo ofrecemos productos de calidad.
Mejores Precios: Sabemos que el costo importa. Negociamos directamente con proveedores para brindarte los precios más competitivos.
Enfocados en la Industria: Nuestro equipo comprende las necesidades específicas de la industria de la construcción y el agro. Estamos aquí para ayudarte a superar desafíos y alcanzar tus objetivos.
¿Cómo aliviamos tus dolores?

Variedad de Productos: Encuentra todo lo que necesitas en un solo lugar: herramientas manuales, pinturas, materiales de obra gruesa y más.
Asesoramiento Personalizado: No solo vendemos productos, sino también conocimiento. Nuestro equipo está listo para brindarte recomendaciones y resolver tus dudas.
Entrega Rápida: Tu tiempo es valioso. Entregamos tus pedidos puntualmente para que puedas avanzar en tus proyectos sin contratiempos.
Únete a nuestra comunidad de constructores, agricultores y apasionados por la mejora continua. En Ferretera Rosario, estamos comprometidos con tu éxito.

Name: MetalGardenMarkers.com
Description:
MetalGardenMarkers.com is a Montana veteran owned company with a proven track record. We value all our customers large or small and endeavor to make your shopping experience with us simple, secure, and enjoyable.

Garden markers, also known as plant labels or garden stakes, offer a unique niche for retail consumers as well as our wholesale community. No matter what you call them or what you use them for, they are a simple, attractive, and inexpensive way to keep your plants organized.

We make every effort to offer our customers unbeatable prices, fast shipping, and outstanding customer service. Name: Wood-Kit
Description:
Based in Belgium, we organize and supply everything that is required to build your own terras of Professional quality.

From the initial calculation, through the delivery of all the qualitative wood and basic materials and the required machines to build your deck without unnecessary frustrations and time lost.

Focus on the fun part of building and enjoy a professional result. 

--
Woodkit is founded out of the enthusiasm for Do-It-Yourself projects but fed the frustration of information availability. We were eager to build around the house ourselves, but the amount of information available either made it hard to know what the best actions were, or the information was simply not there!

We want to give anyone the opportunity to build their own terras, guided step by step, and to focus on the part they like the most.

It goes as followed:
1. Send your desired terras. Dimention, situation in the garden.
Ideally with a floor plan or images.

2. We propose a plan and pricing for ALL the required materials: From the screws to go in the ground to the screws to fix the deck. 

3. All your materials are delivered to your house, and so will all the machines be delivered. Need help to build? We can guide you on your way or help you build.

4. A step-by-step plan will guide you through the entire construction of your deck.

5. Once done we will come and pick up all the machines and leftover wood to make sure your garden is empty and ready to enjoy.

6. Enjoy your deck!

Name: RONA Centre de Rénovation St Patrick Montréal
Description:
Fondée en 1889 par Georges Lanouette, la Quincaillerie Notre-Dame a toujours œuvré dans St-Henri, la « Petite-Bourgogne ». Depuis lors, elle a évolué en une entreprise familiale exploitée par ses deux petits-fils, Jean et Marc, ainsi que par leur père, Georges.

Jadis un petit commerce de quartier, cette entreprise, dont la surface s’étend maintenant sur 20 000 pieds carrés, continue de se distinguer par son service courtois et personnalisé. Les besoins sans cesse croissant des clients ont amené les Lanouette à élargir considérablement leur base de services et de produits en plus de créer une section commerciale et industrielle pour mieux satisfaire les besoins des entreprises.
La division Industrium de la Quincaillerie Notre-Dame représente un atout majeur. Elle commercialise des produits exclusifs ainsi qu’une gamme impressionnante de fournitures destinées à cette tranche particulière de notre clientèle.

Les Lanouette sont heureux de compter parmi les fournisseurs les mieux cotés parmi ses clients. C’est la raison pour laquelle, en 1994, ils ont acquis le « Centre de rénovation Magnan ». Oeuvrant aujourd’hui sous le nom de Centre de rénovation St-Patrick, ce commerce commercialise une gamme étendue de fournitures et de matériaux de construction.
La multitude de matériaux de construction que l’on y retrouve demeure une valeur sûre pour cet établissement doté d’une vaste cour à bois de 60 000 pieds carrés dont les installations se trouvent à la fois à l’intérieur et à l’extérieur. De plus, un service de livraison rapide compte parmi les nombreux avantages dont bénéficient les clients.

La Quincaillerie Notre-Dame et le Centre de Rénovation St-Patrick forment une entité unique. La nature complémentaire de ces deux commerces assure aux clients choix, variété et qualité. Par-dessus tout, elle inspire confiance et loyauté.

Name: EcoStel Stelkozijnen
Description:
Ecostel: De slimme oplossing voor kozijnrenovatie én nieuwbouw

Ecostel is hét innovatieve stelkozijn dat renovatie en montage van kozijnen sneller, eenvoudiger en duurzamer maakt. Dankzij de geïntegreerde flexibele rubber is het gebruik van compriband overbodig. De rubber zorgt voor een perfecte afdichting van kieren en naden en maakt het werk efficiënter voor elke vakman.

 Voordelen van Ecostel op een rij
	•	Snelle en eenvoudige montage
De geïntegreerde rubber maakt zagen en monteren eenvoudiger dan ooit — direct verwerken zonder extra handelingen.
	•	Flexibel in gebruik
Toch liever compriband gebruiken? De rubber is eenvoudig te verwijderen, zodat je altijd maatwerk kunt leveren.
	•	Past op elke muur
Dankzij de slimme sleufconstructie is Ecostel aanpasbaar aan verschillende wanddiktes — ideaal bij situaties waarbij de binnenmuur smaller is dan de buitenmuur.
	•	Veilig en praktisch in gebruik
De sleuf is afgestemd op de dikte van standaard zaagbladen. Daardoor wordt het zaagblad minder belast en is het niet nodig om de zaagtafel hoog af te stellen — dat werkt veiliger én preciezer.
	•	Krasbestendig en kleurvast
Ecostel is volledig donkerantraciet van kleur, vergelijkbaar met schaduw. Hierdoor vallen krassen nauwelijks op. Bovendien is het materiaal UV-bestendig, dus verkleurt het niet in de zon.
	•	Ook perfect voor nieuwbouw
Hoewel ontwikkeld met renovatie in gedachten, is Ecostel ook uitstekend toepasbaar bij nieuwbouwprojecten.

Name: Da Kine Paints LLC
Description:
Da Kine Paints was founded in February 2015.  At the time, Michelle was attending University of Hawaii Maui College, enrolled in the Applied Business and Information Technology (ABIT) bachelor’s degree program.  Upon Graduation, what started as a school project later flourished into a successful family-owned local Maui business.  We opened our doors as the only Benjamin Moore Retailer on Maui in November 2015.  Da Kine Paints was created by Michelle and her father, Frank Heller.  Michelle is a Navy Veteran and a mother, who has been involved in the paint industry on Maui since 2009.  Frank passed away in November 2022, Michelle continues to run the business in his honor.

Although the employees have changed over the years, our family business has remained united providing quality paints for colorful dreams with the highest level of customer service and product knowledge.  We provide “how to” information, precise color matching, and technical support for any project you can imagine.  We take the time to get to know our customers, always asking about the project they are working on, to provide the best product and application technique.  At Da Kine Paints, we feel that the personal assistance and expert advice we provide is what sets us apart from any big-box or corporate owned store.

Name: The Ripper Mowing Company
Description:
At The Ripper Mowing Company, we’re transforming the way Australia mows—one electric machine at a time. Proudly founded in Australia, we're a startup driven by a deep commitment to sustainability, innovation, and performance.

Our all-electric commercial remote control zero turn riding mowers are engineered for the future of land care. Whether it’s parks, sports fields, campuses, or large private properties, our mowers deliver professional-grade results with minimal environmental impact.

For homeowners, we offer a growing range of intelligent robotic mowers designed to keep lawns perfectly trimmed with minimal effort. These compact, quiet, and fully autonomous machines are ideal for modern households looking to reduce their environmental footprint while enjoying a pristine lawn year-round.

Australia’s unique landscapes and growing demand for greener solutions inspired us to create a smarter way to mow—one that reduces carbon emissions, lowers operational costs, and supports healthier communities. As climate change and fuel costs continue to rise, we believe it's time to ditch diesel and embrace electric.

The Ripper Mowing Company is more than a mower distributor —we’re part of a growing movement toward cleaner, more responsible land management. Our team is passionate about creating high-performance tools that help businesses, councils, and contractors achieve their sustainability goals without sacrificing efficiency or reliability.

Join us as we lead the charge in electric mowing innovation—built for Australia, designed for the planet.

UV-resistant, weather-proof designs for long-lasting protection
Custom sizes and configurations to fit any surface
Easy-to-install kits for DIY solutions
Professional installation services available

Why Choose The Bird Spikes Company?

Eco-Friendly Solutions: Our products are designed to deter birds without causing harm, aligning with wildlife protection standards.

Versatility: Effective for various bird species, including pigeons, seagulls, and starlings.

Aesthetic Integration: Low-profile designs that blend seamlessly with your architecture.

Cost-Effective: Prevent costly damages to buildings, equipment, and inventory.

Health and Safety: Reduce health risks associated with bird droppings and nesting materials.

Customization: Tailored solutions for diverse applications - from historical buildings to industrial facilities.

Expert Consultation: Our team provides personalized advice to address your specific bird control challenges.

Quality Assurance: All products undergo rigorous testing and come with a 5-year warranty.

Educational Resources: Access our extensive library of installation guides, FAQs, and best practices.

Ongoing Support: Dedicated customer service to assist you before, during, and after your purchase.

Knowledgeable Staff – We know windows and doors. Following your free consultation, we will explain all your options that best fit your needs so you can make an informed buying decision.
Exceptional Performance – More low-e means better performance. Our standard triple pane glass package has an extra low-e surface (meaning two low-e surfaces, not just one), so the windows we sell are Energy Star qualified for all zones including the Arctic.
Better by Design – We’ve scoured Canada to find the highest quality products with components like Ostaco’s superior heavy duty triple pane hinge and the three-point lock hardware on EVW’s System 2200 sliding patio door.
Unmatched Selection – We have the best selection of quality window and door products in Manitoba. No matter what your requirements are, we have the solutions.
Warranty – Our manufacturers have excellent product warranties which are provided with our quotes, and our installation warranty is five years against defects in installation labour.
Supply Only or with Expert Installation – Do it yourself or have our expert installers do the work for you. Our installers really care about the work they’re doing on your home, and it shows.
No Gimmicks, No High-Pressure Sales and Free, No Obligation Quotes – The majority of our sales come from repeat customers and referrals because we offer exceptional window and door products that provide superior performance at very reasonable prices.

Il nostro negozio nasce nel 1982 a Cagliari in Sardegna, da un’idea del fondatore Gianni Fadda. Grazie alla sua passione e al suo impegno, apre uno dei primi negozi cittadini specializzati in macchine da giardinaggio, forestali, agricole, per l’edilizia e per il lavoro all’aperto.

Grazie alla nostra esperienza e competenza nel settore, da 30 anni siamo il punto di riferimento sicuro per tutti coloro che non si accontentano di un semplice negozio in cui acquistare attrezzi e macchinari, ma che cercano un fornitore competente e preparato, che sia capace di consigliare sempre il prodotto più adatto alle esigenze di ciascun cliente, sia esso un professionista del verde, un utente privato oppure un ente pubblico.

La nostra attività infatti non si limita alla mera vendita, ma abbiamo fatto del rapporto col cliente un nostro punto di forza: conosciamo bene ogni prodotto che trattiamo e offriamo la nostra consulenza specializzata per guidarlo nella scelta del prodotto più adatto, seguendolo poi con un attento servizio post-vendita, grazie ai nostri tecnici altamente specializzati e ad un vasto magazzino di ricambi ed accessori originali.

Inoltre, siamo il CENTRO DI ASSISTENZA AUTORIZZATO delle più importanti case produttrici del settore.

Da noi puoi anche trovare una sezione dedicata alla vendita dell’usato e al NOLEGGIO di macchinari.

Da qualche anno abbiamo deciso di espanderci e abbiamo avviato il nostro NEGOZIO ONLINE, in cui proponiamo gli stessi macchinari e articoli di alta qualità, ricambi e accessori delle migliori marche, che trattiamo nel nostro negozio fisico.

Dengan pengalaman lebih dari 10 tahun di industri ini, kami berdedikasi untuk menghadirkan produk rumput sintetis yang tidak hanya memenuhi tetapi melampaui ekspektasi Anda.

Kami menawarkan berbagai jenis rumput sintetis yang telah teruji kualitasnya, termasuk:

Rumput Swiss: Dikenal karena teksturnya yang alami dan daya tahannya.
Rumput Jepang: Memadukan keindahan dengan fungsionalitas untuk tampilan yang elegan.
Rumput Golf Premium: Ideal untuk lapangan golf dengan standar internasional.
Rumput Futsal / Mini Soccer: Dirancang untuk memberikan performa terbaik dalam permainan olahraga.

Mengapa Memilih Kami?
- Kualitas Terbaik Kelas Dunia: Produk import kami menjamin kualitas yang tidak diragukan lagi.
- Layanan Lengkap: Dari survey, instalasi, hingga pengiriman, kami menyediakan layanan menyeluruh ke seluruh Indonesia.
- Expert dalam Pemasangan: Tim kami yang berpengalaman siap memastikan pemasangan rumput sintetis Anda sempurna.

Kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan layanan terbaik dan solusi rumput sintetis yang sesuai dengan kebutuhan Anda.

Name: Zerozanz.it - giardini senza zanzare
Description:
Soluzioni Professionali per Spazi Esterni Senza Insetti

 Benvenuto! Zerozanz.it – Giardini senza zanzare è un'azienda di Ravenna specializzata nella disinfestazione automatica per spazi esterni. La nostra missione è migliorare il comfort e la vivibilità degli ambienti all’aperto, eliminando il problema di zanzare e insetti molesti in modo efficace, sostenibile e tecnologicamente avanzato.
Siamo installatori autorizzati #FREEZANZ .

 Cosa facciamo?
Progettiamo e installiamo impianti di disinfestazione automatica simili a quelli di irrigazione, ma con la capacità di nebulizzare prodotti anti-insetti in modo programmato. I nostri sistemi proteggono giardini privati, attività commerciali, ristoranti, hotel, strutture sanitarie, strutture ricettive e stabilimenti balneari, garantendo ambienti sereni e privi di insetti.

 I nostri servizi includono:
 Disinfestazione automatica contro zanzare, mosche, vespe, tafani e cimici.
 Disabituanti naturali per allontanare piccioni, gabbiani, roditori, rettili, cinghiali e animali randagi.
 Sanificazione ambientale per spazi pubblici e privati, con prodotti a base alcolica o naturali.
 Sistemi di raffrescamento per esterni, ideali per affrontare le calde estati italiane.
 Profumatori per giardini con essenze di gelsomino e legno di sandalo.

 Dove operiamo?
Zerozanz.it ha sede a Ravenna e serve clienti in tutta la Romagna, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate per privati e aziende.

 Perché scegliere Zerozanz.it?
 Tecnologia e innovazione: sistemi connessi e gestibili da remoto.
 Sostenibilità: prodotti naturali e soluzioni a basso impatto ambientale.
 Esperienza e specializzazione: ci occupiamo solo di impianti di disinfestazione, garantendo un servizio mirato e altamente professionale.

 Se vuoi eliminare il problema degli insetti nel tuo spazio esterno, contattami! Sono sempre disponibile per un confronto, una consulenza o una possibile collaborazione.

 Colleghiamoci su LinkedIn e parliamone!

Name: Dynacem Schweiz
Description:
Quellsprengstoff DYNACEM - Beratung und Verkauf Schweiz.

Wir sind die kompetente Anlaufstelle für explosionsfreie Sprengmittel. Bei uns profitieren Sie von persönlicher und lösungsorientierter Beratung in Verbindung mit einem unschlagbaren Produkt. Wir liefern DYNACEM kostenlos in die ganze Schweiz und stehen Ihnen während der Bauphase beratend zur Seite.

Unser Quellsprengstoff steht für die sichere und erschütterungsfreie Zerkleinerung von Felsen, Stein und Beton. DYNACEM kann dabei von JEDEM eingesetzt werden, ohne dass spezielle Voraussetzungen oder Einrichtungen nötig sind. Expansivzement DYNACEM kann im Innen- wie im Aussenbereich eingesetzt werden und ist dabei umweltschonend und nicht gefährdend für die Umwelt.

Im Gegensatz zu anderen, vergleichbaren Quellsprengstoffen, wie beispielsweise Betonamit, ist DYNACEM in 3 verschieden Varianten erhältlich. Der damit abgedeckte Temperaturbereich von -5°C bis 50 °C ermöglicht den Einsatz zu jeder Jahreszeit mit den bestmöglichen Sprengergebnissen.

Insbesondere bei Temperaturen unter 10 °C ist DYNACEM mit Abstand das zuverlässigste und kraftvollste Produkt auf dem Markt.

Name: Hula Honey Hive
Description:
We design and build Top Bar Beehives optimized for Hawaiʻi's unique environmental challenges: high humidity, intense UV exposure, year-round warmth, and pest pressure including Small Hive Beetle.

Technical Advantages:
* Yakisugi (Shou Sugi Ban) Treatment: Traditional carbonization process creating hydrophobic, dimensionally-stable wood surfaces with 50+ year outdoor lifespan
* Trapezoidal Hive Geometry: Mimics natural tree cavity dimensions, promoting straight comb attachment and natural thermoregulation
* Horizontal Management: Reduces colony disturbance, eliminates heavy lifting, enables observation-window monitoring
* Chemical-Free Construction: Raw linseed oil finish, zero VOCs, completely bee-safe materials

Our Expertise:Carpentry + practical beekeeping experience + deep understanding of Hawaiʻi's microclimates = hives that actually work in real-world tropical conditions.

Products & Services:
* Ready-to-use top bar hives
* Comprehensive DIY construction guides
* Natural beekeeping education
* Hawaiʻi-specific management resources

Based in Hawaiʻi | Built for Hawaiʻi
hulahoneyhive.com

MAGNAGRASS adalah solusi grass paver modern yang dirancang untuk memberikan tampilan estetis sekaligus ramah lingkungan. Dibuat dari material yang tahan lama dan dapat terurai secara alami, MAGNAGRASS memungkinkan penetrasi air yang optimal, mengurangi risiko genangan, dan meningkatkan kualitas tanah di sekitarnya. Dengan desain modular yang mudah dipasang, produk ini menawarkan fleksibilitas tinggi untuk berbagai aplikasi, mulai dari area parkir, trotoar, hingga taman publik.

Penggunaan MAGNAGRASS berkontribusi pada pengurangan jejak karbon dan menjaga keberlanjutan lingkungan. Dengan memberi ruang bagi vegetasi untuk tumbuh, produk ini juga mendukung biodiversitas dan meningkatkan kualitas udara. Ideal untuk proyek yang mengutamakan prinsip desain hijau, MAGNAGRASS adalah pilihan tepat bagi mereka yang ingin menciptakan ruang luar yang indah sekaligus bertanggung jawab terhadap lingkungan.

Name: Kolor farby
Description: Największy w Krakowie specjalistyczny sklep z farbami do malowania wszystkich możliwych powierzchni. W naszych sklepach farby i lakiery w każdym przedziale cenowym, od farb najpopularniejszych krajowych producentów, aż do wiodących niemieckich i fińskich producentów farb dekoracyjnych oraz przemysłowych. Nasi sprzedawcy doradzą, jaki rodzaj farby wybrać, podpowiedzą, kiedy zastosowanie droższej farby przyniesie lepsze rezultaty dostosowując rozwiązanie do konkretnej sytuacji. Doradzą, jakich narzędzi użyć, aby efektywnie wykorzystać zakupioną farbę. W naszej ofercie poza farbami do ścian i sufitów, znajdą Państwo farby do dachów (duża rozpiętość cenowa oferty), farby do metalu (na zewnątrz – do wszelkich skorodowanych i nie tylko elementów stalowych oraz do wnętrz), farby do drewna (do wnętrz i na zewnątrz, do zabawek drewnianych), oleje do drewna (tarasów i do blatów), farby przemysłowe (do konstrukcji stalowych, betonu), farby specjalistyczne (dla gastronomii, do mokrych pomieszczeń, szpitali, szkół) oraz lakiery dla motoryzacji, także w formie spraya. Posiadamy produkty z certyfikatami ekologicznymi oraz farby bezpieczne dla alergików. Oferujemy produkty marek: Tikkurila, Beckers, Dulux, Śnieżka, Kabe, Feidal, Dekoral, Ceresit, Tytan oraz wielu innych. W naszych punktach znajdą Państwo mieszalniki farb i tynków, w których możemy przygotować każdy kolor. Zapraszamy i czekamy na Państwa w dwóch miejscach w Krakowie - Zakopiańska 58 oraz Wielicka 87!

Name: emniyet ticaret 1955
Description:
1955 yılında kurulan Emniyetticaret, altmış yılı aşkın bir süredir hırdavat ve boya endüstrisinde önde gelen bir şirket olmuştur. Aynı sektörde üç kuşaktır başarılı bir şekilde faaliyet gösteren, bu alandaki bağlılığını ve uzmanlığını sergileyen bir aile şirketidir. 

Yıllar geçtikçe, şirketimiz değişen pazar trendlerine uyum sağlayarak 2019 yılında Nalbur Adam markasıyla e-ticarete başladı. Şirketimizin e-ticaret çağındaki dikkat çekici büyümesi ve başarısı dikkatlerden kaçmadı. Değişen iş ortamına uyum sağlama ve ortaya çıkan fırsatlardan yararlanma yeteneğinin bir kanıtı olarak Türkiye’nin en hızlı büyüyen 34. şirketi olarak seçildi.
İnovasyona ve müşteri odaklılığa olan bağlılığımız, sektörün ön saflarında kalmamızı ve hızlı büyümeyi sürdürmemizi sağlıyor. En hızlı büyüyen 34. şirket olarak, başarılarımızdan gurur duyuyoruz ve gelecekteki başarılarımıza yatırım yapmaya kararlıyız.

Chez BG Spare, nous croyons au respect de notre environnement en alliant plaisir, facilité, responsabilité et sobriété. Ces valeurs guident chacune de nos actions et nous aident à créer un environnement de travail dynamique et inspirant.

 Notre Équipe 
Chez BG Spare, nous sommes fiers de notre équipe talentueuse et diversifiée. Nos collaborateurs sont notre plus grande richesse, et nous sommes déterminés à offrir un environnement de travail inclusif où chacun peut s'épanouir et réussir.

 Nos Réalisations 
Au fil des années, nous avons eu le privilège d'être parmi les leaders du marché mondial de matériel de jardin. Ces succès sont le fruit du travail acharné et de l'engagement de toute notre équipe.

 Restez Connectés !

Name: Vuba Bulgaria
Description:
Vuba България сме ексклузивен представител за България на Vuba Resin Bound, водеща британска компания, специализирана в производството на висококачествени смоли и системи за декоративни повърхности.  

Нашата мисия е да предоставим на българския пазар иновативни, издръжливи и екологични решения за подови настилки, подходящи както за жилищни, така и за търговски и обществени пространства. Vuba Resin Bound предлага естетически издържани и дълготрайни настилки, които са устойчиви на атмосферни влияния, лесни за поддръжка и с отлични дренажни свойства.  

Ние предлагаме пълен набор от продукти, включително смоли, естествени каменни агрегати и аксесоари, както и професионални консултации и обучение за правилното полагане на настилките. Сътрудничим с архитекти, строителни компании, ландшафтни дизайнери и частни клиенти, за да осигурим персонализирани решения за всеки проект.  

С нас можете да трансформирате дворове, алеи, паркове, търговски площи и много други пространства с модерни, здрави и екологично чисти повърхности.

CBS is a new name with a strong foundation. Backed by Kowallis & Richards — a trusted name in building products for over 75 years — we’re bringing that same legacy of excellence to Cascade. We saw a gap in the local market. So we filled it. No more long drives just to find the right fasteners, tools, or materials. No more settling for a retail store that’s not built for the trade

Why cascade? Because this community matters.
We’re proud to be locally owned and operated, with deep respect for the people and history of Cascade. We’ve restored the original name and location of a once-iconic store because we believe in honoring local roots while building for the future.

Cascade Building Supply is led by Jeff Sayer, a longtime business leader, entrepreneur, and former Idaho Secretary of Commerce. With a background in construction, finance, and economic development, Jeff brings vision and experience to the table. Alongside him is Sal, our Operations Manager and hands-on expert who makes sure everything on the ground runs smoothly. Together, they’re building a company that puts pros first.

When you walk into CBS, we want you to feel like you’ve got a partner in your corner. Someone who listens, adapts, and stocks what you need. We carry local products like custom cabinetry from Mountain Woodworks, we offer delivery to job sites, and we’re here Monday through Friday at 8am sharp

Name: MACA
Description:
Organic natural stone is a highly valuable and durable resource found on earth. However, traditional stone processing methods have remained unchanged for decades, resulting in outdated and inefficient techniques. At MACA, we have developed a patented technology to extract ultra-light and ultra-thin slabs of some of the world's most stunning natural stones in an eco-friendly and sustainable way.

Our natural stone slabs are state-of-the-art in both weight and appearance, with the natural finish and texture of the organic stone carefully preserved. Despite being only 1.5mm-4mm thick, our product retains the same durability and aesthetic appeal as traditional slabs, without their excess weight and environmental waste. Additionally, MACA backing light slabs are capable of transmitting light, giving the stone a naturally warmer appearance and making it equally suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications.

Name: CLIPTT
Description:
Modular Outdoor Kitchens. 
At CLIPTT, we believe your outdoor space deserves the same care, craftsmanship and attention to detail as the heart of your home. That’s why we specialise in creating modular outdoor kitchens that combine premium quality with genuine affordability — giving you a beautiful, functional space to cook, entertain and enjoy for years to come.

Drawing on years of design and manufacturing experience, our team has developed a system that offers over 120 configurations, so every customer can create a kitchen that perfectly fits their lifestyle, space and aesthetic. From compact patios to expansive garden terraces, CLIPTT makes it possible to design your dream outdoor Kitchen.

Every CLIPTT kitchen is designed and manufactured in the UK, blending precision engineering with timeless design. We use only premium, weather-resistant materials — robust aluminium frames for structural strength, sustainably sourced Iroko hardwoods for warmth and character, and luxury porcelain worktops for a sleek, low-maintenance finish. These materials don’t just look good on day one; they’re chosen to perform beautifully season after season, even in the unpredictable British climate.

Our focus on quality and longevity doesn’t mean compromise on price. We’ve engineered a system that’s affordable without cutting corners, delivering genuine value to our customers and redefining what “premium” can mean in outdoor living.

From your first enquiry, you’ll deal with a team that knows outdoor kitchens inside out. We’re passionate about design, functionality and materials — and we’re here to guide you through every step of the process. Our free consultations are designed to help you explore ideas, compare configurations and make informed decisions. Whether you’re an architect, a landscaper or a homeowner looking to transform your garden, you’ll find our advice practical, transparent and rooted in real expertise.

Description:
Το tolis.shop αποτελεί μια νέα και καινοτόμα επιλογή για τους καταναλωτές και τους κατασκευαστές κάθε είδους.

Name: Jutro.sk
Description:
Vitajte v JUTRO.sk - vašom spoľahlivom partnerovi pre náradie pre dielňu, stavbu a záhradu!

Sme hrdí na to, že vám môžeme ponúknuť široký výber náradia, ktoré vám pomôže v každom vašom projekte. Nech už pracujete v dielni, na stavbe alebo v záhrade, naša ponuka je tu, aby vám uspokojila vaše potreby.

Pre tých, ktorí majú radi majstrovstvo a presnosť vo svojich projektoch, ponúkame široký výber ručného náradia. Od kvalitných kladív, skrutkovačov a kľúčov po pilníky, ryžovacie nože a vývrtky, náš sortiment ručného náradia vám umožní dokončiť akýkoľvek projekt s ľahkosťou a presnosťou.

Pre tých, ktorí sa púšťajú do väčších projektov, ako je stavba domu alebo renovácia, ponúkame široký výber elektrického náradia. Od vŕtačiek, píl, brúsok po mlynčeky a teplovzdušné pištole, naše elektrické náradie vám umožní vykonávať práce rýchlo a efektívne.

A pre tých, ktorí milujú svoje záhrady a chcú, aby vyzerala čo najlepšie, máme široký výber záhradného náradia. Od kvalitných kosačiek, kultivátorov, záhradných nožov po záhradné vidly, hrable a sekery, naše záhradné náradie vám pomôže udržať vašu záhradu v skvelej kondícii po celý rok.

Okrem toho máme pre vás široký výber príslušenstva a doplnkov, ako sú ochranné pomôcky, puzdrá a tašky na náradie, ktoré vám umožnia uskladniť a chrániť vaše náradie počas cestovania alebo skladovania.

Naša misia je poskytnúť vám najvyššiu kvalitu náradia za konkurencieschopné ceny. Všetky naše produkty sú starostlivo vybrané a testované, aby sme vám mohli ponúknuť iba to najlepšie.

Sme tu, aby sme vám pomohli s každým vaším projektom a aby sme vám poskytli najlepšie možné služby. S naším rýchlym a jednoduchým procesom objednávania môžete nakupovať s istotou a dôverou.

Takže neváhajte a navštívte náš online obchod na JUTRO.sk ešte dnes a objavte svet kvalitného náradia pre vaše dielne, stavby a záhrady!

Name: L.Wackernagel.ek
Description:
Wir sind ein Familienbetrieb der seit 1963 besteht, einst von Lieselotte und Horst Wackernagel in Jägersburg gegründet. Seit 1969 in Lorsch ansässig, 1986 etablierten wir uns im Gewerbegebiet. Im September 2003 übernahmen wir Margit Müller (Tochter) und Ehemann Helmut Müller den STIHL-SERVICE
sowie VIKING   TORO AS-Rasenmäher, Scheppach Holzverarbeitungsmachinen, Endress Stromerzeuger und vieles mehr.

Desweiteren bieten wir einen Miet- & Schärfsevice und einen Messer Fachhandel.

Bei uns sind Sie bestens aufgehoben - ob vor oder nach dem Kauf. Wir beraten Sie bei der Wahl des für Ihren Bedarf optimal geeigneten Gerätes, geben Ihnen wertvolle Tipps zum fachgerechten Einsatz, sowie eine Einweisung ihres Gerätes und bieten professionellen Service. Auch nach dem Kauf bleiben wir Ansprechpartner für unsere Kunden. Zum Beispiel dann, wenn weiterer Beratungsbedarf besteht oder wenn ein Garantiefall bearbeitet werden muss. Auch hier ist eine schnelle und zuverlässige Abwicklung garantiert.

Eine regelmäßige Weiterbildung zu den Produkten vertiefen das Detailwissen.

Da die meisten technischen Geräte in regelmäßigem Rhythmus gewartet und repariert werden müssen, verfügen wir über eine eigene Werkstatt, in der auch die Geräte fremder Fabrikate repariert und gewartet werden.

Dank des umfangreichen Ersatzteillagers lassen sich viele Schäden schnell und zuverlässig beseitigen. Dies ist besonders wichtig, wenn die Geräte dringend benötigt werden.

So werden Sie lange Freude an Ihren Motorgeräten haben. Denn ein gepflegtes Grundstück ist ein echtes Aushängeschild.

Unser Team freut sich, Sie in unseren Geschäft persönlich begrüßen zu dürfen.

Name: Paraíso Grow
Description:
A Paraíso Grow é uma loja responsável por vender itens para cultivo, com foco em cultivo de interior, com equipamentos que são capazes de simular o meio ambiente ideal, onde cada fator relacionado ao clima pode ser controlado.

No cultivo exterior, mais conhecida no mundo todo, as plantas ficam muito expostas e desprotegidas do ataque de pragas, excesso ou falta de chuvas, raios solares, entre outros. Já no cultivo indoor, é importante entender sobre as necessidades básicas das plantas e suprir todas as premências que ela precisar. O grande diferencial entre os dois tipos de cultivo está no curto espaço de tempo entre as colheitas. Através do fotoperíodo, a pessoa pode determinar quando a sua planta irá crescer em matéria vegetal e até mesmo começar e terminar de florir, momento da colheita dos frutos, entre outros.

Nós, da Paraíso Grow, buscamos ajudar você a construir o ambiente adequado para um cultivo de interior de qualidade.

A Paraíso Grow surgiu a partir da inspiração do mercado europeu, através de uma viagem feita pelo fundador. Nessa viagem, ele teve a oportunidade de conhecer alguns Grows Shop (lojas de cultivo), que eram bem diferentes das existentes no Brasil. Assim, percebeu-se que era uma área muito propícia para atuar e o projeto da loja foi, aos poucos, saindo do papel.

A Paraíso Grow vem trabalhando de forma a aumentar a conexão das pessoas para com a natureza. O poder do autocultivo pode ser surpreendente!

Name: Argilicious
Description:
Notre produit commence dans les profondeurs du Maroc, berceau de traditions culinaires millénaires. Inspirés par la richesse de la culture marocaine, nous avons créé notre entreprise avec une passion brûlante pour les barbecues en argile.

 Plongez dans l'authenticité des traditions culinaires marocaines avec nos barbecues en argile ! 

 Chaque barbecue en argile que nous importons est le fruit d'un artisanat millénaire transmis de génération en génération. Chaque courbe, chaque détail est façonné avec passion, reflétant la fierté de notre héritage culturel. 

 Préparez-vous à une expérience culinaire incroyable ! Nos barbecues en argile offrent une cuisson uniforme et une rétention optimale des saveurs. Que ce soit pour des grillades juteuses, des plats mijotés ou des tajines traditionnels, chaque bouchée révèle le véritable potentiel des ingrédients. 

 Invitez l'âme du Maroc dans votre jardin ! Nos barbecues en argile marocains créent une ambiance chaleureuse et une atmosphère conviviale. C'est bien plus qu'un simple barbecue, c'est une invitation à un voyage sensoriel, un éveil des sens et une création de souvenirs mémorables entre amis et en famille. 

 Chez nous, l'engagement envers la qualité et l'environnement est primordial. Chaque barbecue en argile est fabriqué avec amour et respectueux de notre belle planète. En choisissant nos produits, vous affirmez votre appréciation des traditions, de la convivialité et de la délicieuse cuisine. 

 Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure culinaire marocaine ! Découvrez l'harmonie entre tradition, qualité et passion avec nos barbecues en argile. Chaque repas en plein air devient une célébration de la gastronomie marocaine.

Postupné rozširovanie sortimentu a väčšie priestory nás priviedli k rozdeleniu predajní na Stavebné centrum a Interiérové centrum. Neskôr v roku 2021 sme rozšírili a obohatili ponuku o sortiment v Záhradnom centre. V súčastnosti je naša ponuka skutočne široká a náš skladový sortiment zahŕňa viac ako 50 000 produktov. 

DOM - BYT - ZÁHRADA je heslo, ktoré nás dokonale vystihuje, pretože u nás zákazník nakúpi všetko "pod jednou strechou" od základov domu, vybavenie do dielne, cez vybavenie interiéru, bytové doplnky, záhradkárske potreby až po oplotenie či okrasné a úžitkové rastliny do záhrady.

Spolupracujeme s poprednými výrobcami na trhu. Naša ponuka je zameraná na široké spektrum zákazníkov, vrátane jednotlivcov, firiem v stavebníctve a záhradníctve, ako aj veľkoobchodných odberateľov.

Name: ADLER Baumschule
Description:
ADLER Baumschule ist ein spezialisiertes Unternehmen, das sich auf den Anbau und Verkauf von Bäumen, Sträuchern und anderen Pflanzen konzentriert. Ihr Angebot richtet sich an private Gartenbesitzer, Landschaftsbauunternehmen sowie kommunale und gewerbliche Kunden. Die Baumschule bietet eine breite Palette an Pflanzen, darunter Zier- und Schattenbäume, Obstbäume, Heckenpflanzen und Stauden. Ein besonderes Augenmerk legt ADLER Baumschule auf die Qualität und Gesundheit der Pflanzen, die unter umweltfreundlichen und nachhaltigen Bedingungen angebaut werden.

Neben dem Pflanzenverkauf bietet ADLER Baumschule auch Beratungsdienste an, um Kunden bei der Auswahl der richtigen Pflanzen für ihren spezifischen Standort und Bodenverhältnisse zu unterstützen. Das geschulte Personal der Baumschule kann auch Tipps zur Pflanzenpflege, zum Schnitt und zur Krankheitsprävention geben, um die Langlebigkeit und Vitalität der Pflanzen zu gewährleisten.

Mit einem Fokus auf Kundenzufriedenheit und Fachwissen in der Pflanzenkultivierung ist ADLER Baumschule ein zuverlässiger Partner für alle, die ihren Garten oder ihre Grünanlage bereichern und verschönern möchten.

Of u nu op zoek bent naar een enkele buxusplant of een grote bestelling wilt plaatsen, bij Buxo staan we klaar om aan uw behoeften te voldoen. Neem vandaag nog contact met ons op en ontdek waarom wij de leverancier zijn voor uw buxus inkoop.

Name: PerfectStone l Garden&Home
Description:
A PerfectStone egy zalai családi vállalkozás, amely különleges, természetes hatású beton lépőkövek, kerti kiegészítők és kerti bútorok gyártásával és forgalmazásával foglalkozik.
Termékeink ötvözik a kézműves precizitást, a modern design világát és a beton nyújtotta tartósságot. Kínálatunkban megtalálhatóak beltéri és kültéri falburkolatok, lábazati kövek, famintás és kőmintás tipegők, beton asztalok, virágkaspók, gyertyatartók és egyedi dekorációs elemek. Minden darabot gondosan válogatott alapanyagokból készítünk, így termékeink nemcsak esztétikusak, hanem fagyállóak, időjárás- és kopásállóak, így egész évben megbízható megoldást nyújtanak.
A PerfectStone fő célja, hogy olyan innovatív és időtálló beton design termékeket kínáljon, amelyek egyszerre szolgálják a praktikumot és az esztétikumot. Legyen szó teraszburkolatról, kerti járdáról, pihenőkert kialakításáról vagy egyedi betonbútorokról, nálunk mindenki megtalálja az igényeinek megfelelő megoldást. Egyedi rendeléseket is vállalunk, különleges minták és színek megvalósításával, hogy valóban személyre szabott végeredményt kapjon.
Büszkék vagyunk rá, hogy a PerfectStone termékei Zala megyéből indulva az egész országban jelen vannak, és otthonokat, kerteket tesznek különlegesebbé. Fontos számunkra a személyes kapcsolat és az ügyfeleink elégedettsége, ezért mindig nyitottak vagyunk az egyedi igények megvalósítására és a szakmai tanácsadásra.
Küldetésünk, hogy a beton természetességét és modern formavilágát ötvözve olyan értéket teremtsünk, amely hosszú távon is inspiráló és maradandó. A PerfectStone választásával nem csupán termékeket kap, hanem egy megbízható partnert, aki segít megvalósítani az otthonról és kertről alkotott elképzeléseit.

Name: TileNBreathe
Description:
Dust mitigation is a big deal on the job site, and TileNBreathe has created 2 dustless products, the CutNBreathe and the MixNBreathe. 

CutNBreathe is for tilers allowing them to cut, mitre, and polish tiles indoors without the dust. CutNBreathe is a portable device that can be used with your current angle grinder and vacuum to collect dust when dry cutting tiles and filter into your M-Class dust extractor.

MixNBreathe is placed on the top of a bucket to reduce dust when pouring and mixing powders, such as grout, adhesives, mortars, and cement. It fits on the top of the most commonly used buckets in the construction industry, such as those that contain grout and those purchased from chain hardware stores. 

Both of our products have been independently tested (as prescribed by Worksafe Australia) by an occupational hygienist and we have a Dust Reduction Report available on our website.

Name: CRAWLDRYER SOLUTIONS INC.
Description:
In the heart of innovation and commitment to healthy living, Crawldryer was born with a singular mission: to revolutionize crawl space encapsulation with high-quality vapor barriers. Our journey began with a vision to create healthier, more comfortable living environments for everyone.
Founded by a team of experts with decades of combined experience in the home improvement industry, Crawldryer recognized the critical need for effective moisture control in crawl spaces. Moisture and humidity, left unchecked, can lead to mold growth, structural damage, and unhealthy air quality in homes. Understanding these challenges, Crawldryer set out to develop the ultimate crawl space vapor barrier.
Our crawl space vapor barriers are crafted from the finest materials, ensuring durability and effectiveness. Each product undergoes rigorous testing to meet the highest standards of quality and performance. Crawldryer's vapor barriers not only block moisture but also enhance energy efficiency, reducing the load on HVAC systems and lowering energy bills.
